prompts.display_text: First of all, here is the prompt you need and the Lovart website. https:// lovart.ai/?sourceId=9020 25 ... Style: Hyper-realistic sci-fi action, cinematic Japanese blockbuster Setting: Tokyo under alien invasion — destroyed streets, fire, debris, alien ships in the sky Sound: Explosions, distant sirens, alien drones, rising orchestral + electronic score Energy: Fast, dramatic, escalating into transformation 0–2s HOOK Wide chaotic shot of Tokyo in ruins. Buildings damaged, fires burning, alien ships hovering overhead. Camera drops quickly into street level—handheld, shaky. A Japanese woman stands in the middle of destruction, breathing heavily. 2–4s Close-up on her face—dirt, sweat, eyes burning with anger. Wind and debris blow past her. She shouts with fury: 「ふざけるな...ここは私たちの世界だ!」 (“Don’t mess with us... this is our world!”) 4–6s Alien drones descend rapidly around her. Energy blasts hit the ground nearby—explosions erupt. She clenches her fists—her body starts trembling with force. 6–8s TRANSFORMATION BEGINS Energy surges through her body. Glowing lines spread across her skin like circuitry. She screams: 「全部...壊してやる!」 (“I’ll destroy all of you!”) 8–10s Armor begins forming dynamically: Metallic plates emerge from light Pieces lock onto her arms, shoulders, chest Helmet starts assembling around her head Camera: Fast orbit, cinematic motion blur 10–12s Full armored warrior now—sleek sci-fi suit, glowing accents. She launches forward at extreme speed toward incoming aliens. Camera: Tracking shot, aggressive forward motion SFX: Sonic burst + energy trail 12–14s Mid-air combat: She strikes an alien with a powerful punch—impact shockwave distorts the air. Follows with rapid combo attacks. Explosions and debris fly around. 14–15s END She lands hard, sliding slightly across the ground. Looks up slowly—armor glowing, eyes intense behind visor. Alien ships still looming above. Final line (calm, deadly): 「まだ終わってない。」 (“It’s not over yet.”) Cut to black on rising sound.

prompts.display_text: 15-second text-to-video continuous single-take sequence. Raw 70s/80s grindhouse horror style. Heavy analog film grain, high contrast, photorealistic practical effects. Heavy speed ramps. NO CUTS. [SUBJECT DESCRIPTIONS] - HEROINE: Ultimate 80s grindhouse final girl, striking athletic early 20s. Wet messy hair, fierce determined expression. Wearing a dark high-cut 80s athletic one-piece swimsuit. Alluring yet lethal. - THE MONSTER: Slimy aquatic beast with dark scales, jagged teeth, milky dead eyes, muscular and visceral. [TIMELINE SCRIPT] 0–3s: [THE DEEP END] Action: She treads water frantically as a massive slimy silhouette rises fast from the pool drain. Camera: Underwater low-angle looking up at her floating silhouette with distorted neon surface light. Audio: Muffled bass, panicked breathing, distant synthwave. 3–6s: [THE AMBUSH] Action: Beast lunges upward. She contorts backward in extreme slow-motion as its jaws snap inches from her face. Camera: Fast underwater orbit locking into tight profile. Audio: Violent water rush dropping to heavy sub-bass hum. 6–9s: [THE GRAPPLE] Action: Beast grabs her thigh. She twists and drives her heel brutally into its snout. Camera: Shaky handheld underwater medium shot. Audio: Thudding impacts, monstrous screech, frantic thrashing. 9–12s: [THE DRAW] Action: She propels backward and draws a serrated dive knife from her calf in elegant slow-motion. Camera: Slight dolly-back into heroic tense framing. Audio: Echoing metallic *schwing* + rising 80s horror synth swell. 12–15s: [THE STRIKE] Action: Beast charges. She lunges forward and drives the knife deep into its skull as they sink into darkness. Camera: Slow tilt-down watching them plunge into the deep end. Audio: Brutal muffled puncture thud fading into crushing underwater silence. [CONSTRAINTS] Single unbroken take. Strictly photorealistic 80s grindhouse look. Accurate underwater physics, light refraction, and bubble dynamics.

prompts.tweet_text:
#Seedance2 #AIVideo Prompt:

15-second text-to-video continuous single-take sequence. Raw 70s/80s grindhouse horror style. Heavy analog film grain, high contrast, photorealistic practical effects. Heavy speed ramps. NO CUTS.

[SUBJECT DESCRIPTIONS]
- HEROINE: Ultimate 80s grindhouse final girl, striking athletic early 20s. Wet messy hair, fierce determined expression. Wearing a dark high-cut 80s athletic one-piece swimsuit. Alluring yet lethal.
- THE MONSTER: Slimy aquatic beast with dark scales, jagged teeth, milky dead eyes, muscular and visceral.

[TIMELINE SCRIPT]

0–3s: [THE DEEP END]
Action: She treads water frantically as a massive slimy silhouette rises fast from the pool drain.
Camera: Underwater low-angle looking up at her floating silhouette with distorted neon surface light.
Audio: Muffled bass, panicked breathing, distant synthwave.

3–6s: [THE AMBUSH]
Action: Beast lunges upward. She contorts backward in extreme slow-motion as its jaws snap inches from her face.
Camera: Fast underwater orbit locking into tight profile.
Audio: Violent water rush dropping to heavy sub-bass hum.

6–9s: [THE GRAPPLE]
Action: Beast grabs her thigh. She twists and drives her heel brutally into its snout.
Camera: Shaky handheld underwater medium shot.
Audio: Thudding impacts, monstrous screech, frantic thrashing.

9–12s: [THE DRAW]
Action: She propels backward and draws a serrated dive knife from her calf in elegant slow-motion.
Camera: Slight dolly-back into heroic tense framing.
Audio: Echoing metallic *schwing* + rising 80s horror synth swell.

12–15s: [THE STRIKE]
Action: Beast charges. She lunges forward and drives the knife deep into its skull as they sink into darkness.
Camera: Slow tilt-down watching them plunge into the deep end.
Audio: Brutal muffled puncture thud fading into crushing underwater silence.

[CONSTRAINTS]
Single unbroken take. Strictly photorealistic 80s grindhouse look. Accurate underwater physics, light refraction, and bubble dynamics.

prompts.display_text: Video prompt seedance 2.0 - 15s text to video The Storm Shepherd vs the Glass Locust King A cinematic weather war. A nomadic shepherd in layered sky-blue robes stands on a high desert ridge during a sandstorm. He fights using a hooked crook, wind channels, and charged storm clouds. His enemy is a king locust made of translucent chitin, lightning veins, and a swarm-crown of crystal insects. The setting transitions from dune ridge → storm trench → lightning plateau → salt crater. 0–3 seconds: the locust king descends out of the storm with a shrieking crown of glass-winged insects. The shepherd drives his crook into the sand and pulls a vortex of wind upward, forcing the first wave of insects into a spiraling wall. Close-ups of cracked lips, cloth snapping, glass wings, and charged dust. 3–7 seconds: the locust king splinters into swarming formations that attack from every direction across a trench carved by wind. The shepherd walks into the storm, redirecting gusts with broad arm sweeps. Each movement creates visible wind corridors that slam the swarm into rock spires. Sand peels off the ground in ribbons. Close-ups of sandals sliding, storm static along the crook, chitin fractures, and lightning flicker under skin. 7–10 seconds: the battle climbs onto a lightning plateau. The locust king towers above him with a giant fan of translucent wings reflecting the whole storm. The shepherd raises both hands and pulls a fork of lightning out of the sky like a rope, then whips it in a massive arc that shears off half the swarm crown. Orbit camera, desert lightning, flying crystal limbs. 10–12 seconds: rapid tracking shot as the shepherd runs across a collapsing salt shelf while the king reforms and dives with all wings screaming. He hooks the crook into its thorax and drags it downward into a charged crater. 12–15 seconds: overhead slow fall into the salt crater as storm winds spiral inward. The shepherd lands first while the locust king breaks apart into rain, glass fragments, and dead static that spiderwebs through the salt. Final frame: one intact locust wing ringing in the wind. Style: epic storm fantasy, desert electricity, glass insect textures, sand and lightning choreography, high-contrast sky warfare.

prompts.display_text: Shot One: Everyday Home Scene Time Segment: 0:00 to 0:02 Shot Distance and Type: Medium shot, handheld follow-cam Camera Movement Path and Speed: The camera subtly sways with the character's movements, with a light, upbeat, and lively rhythm. The camera follows the trajectory of the girl's arm waving, finally facing the prop she raises. Main Subject Actions and Expression: The girl is wearing white loungewear pajamas patterned with Crayon Shin-chan designs and a bear hairband. She holds a sheet of white paper rolled into the shape of a telescope. She first playfully waves this "paper telescope" with a smile on her face, then directly aims one end of the "paper telescope" at and fully presses it against the lens, using the physical darkness inside the paper tube to block the frame, creating a perfect transition medium. Visual Effects: No obvious effects, belonging to everyday real-light-and-shadow recording. Cleverly utilizes the dark circular hole inside the paper tube rolled into a telescope shape as a physical transition entry medium. Overall Color Tone and Mood: Warm white tones, bright. Mood is relaxed, everyday, and lively, laying the groundwork for the dramatic contrast to follow. Shot Two: Spacetime Tunnel Transition Time Segment: 0:02 to 0:04 Shot Distance and Type: Close-up transitioning to full wide shot, first-person perspective push-in Camera Movement Path and Speed: The camera rapidly pushes forward at high speed, visually as if directly penetrating the inner hole of the "paper telescope" the girl pressed against the lens in the previous second, delivering an extremely strong visual impact and a sense of extreme speed. Main Subject Actions and Expression: No character subject, primarily showcasing the process of traversing space. Visual Effects: Intense CG visual effects, deep red vortex and wormhole effects with a strong sense of suction and spatial distortion, followed by bats flying out from the depths of the frame as visual guides. Overall Color Tone and Mood: Interwoven dark red and black. Mood shifts instantly from relaxed to mysterious, dangerous, and filled with a sense of the unknown. Shot Three: Vampire Princess Descends Time Segment: 0:04 to 0:06 Shot Distance and Type: Overhead full wide shot transitioning to medium shot, panning camera (downward pan) Camera Movement Path and Speed: The camera pans from top to bottom, aligning with the character's upward gaze, with speed transitioning from fast to slow motion, creating tremendous visual tension. Main Subject Actions and Expression: The transformed vampire princess (white hair, elven ears, white ornate gown, red nails) gazes up at the lens from below, extending one hand toward the lens as if inviting or casting a spell, her expression alluring yet brimming with dangerous allure. Visual Effects: Strong slow-motion (high-frame-rate) treatment, with a large amount of red petals or light-spot particles drifting in the foreground, a red magical halo floating above the character's head, and a background of intersecting black Gothic tree branches and net-like structures. Overall Color Tone and Mood: Intense dark red blended with high-contrast cool white tones. Mood is mysterious, seductive, and infused with Gothic opulence. Shot Four: Alluring Freeze-Frame Time Segment: 0:06 to 0:09 Shot Distance and Type: Medium close-up, with a slight handheld push-pull feel Camera Movement Path and Speed: The camera remains relatively fixed but with a breathing and subtle tremor sensation, syncing with the music's beat for a strong rhythmic pulse. Main Subject Actions and Expression: The character holds the extended-hand pose, lightly touching her lips with the other hand, her gaze locked directly on the lens, her expression radiating immense allure and oppressive intensity. Visual Effects: Incorporates frame-skipping, rapid flickers, subtle screen distortion (glitch-fault style), and radial blur effects, paired with high-frequency red light flashes to amplify visual impact and cyberpunk vibes. Overall Color Tone and Mood: Large areas of high-saturation red background, with the character at the absolute visual center. Mood is high-energy, intensely visually aggressive. Shot Five: Blood Moon Flight Time Segment: 0:09 to 0:12 Shot Distance and Type: Long shot, fixed camera Camera Movement Path and Speed: The camera remains steady, with elements in the frame exhibiting a slow floating sensation. Main Subject Actions and Expression: The character unfurls massive demonic wings, hovering in the night sky in an expansive pose. Visual Effects: Grand scene compositing, with a massive blood moon in the background, rendered with dark red cloud layers; slow-motion flocks of bats accompany in flight, evoking a powerful epic atmosphere. Overall Color Tone and Mood: Dark fantasy tones dominated by black and red. Mood is grand, awe-inspiring, and brimming with dominance, perfectly echoing the video's theme.

prompts.display_text: Shot 2-1 (0s–5s) Medium shot, slow dolly in. A morning market in the fused city. Glowing plants grown by elves with magic stand alongside Earth's vegetables and fruits, and mithril trinkets forged by dwarves are arranged in wooden crates. An elf merchant with pointed ears exchanges goods with a smiling Earth human. A beastkin girl with animal ears and a tail curiously picks up an Earth fruit. Soft morning natural light, warm color temperature, cinematic, shallow depth of field. Narration (low, resonant male Japanese voice): "Elves brought magic, and dwarves brought technology." White Japanese subtitles at the bottom of the screen: "Elves brought magic, and dwarves brought technology." Shot 2-2 (5s–10s) Medium shot, slow horizontal pan. A street in the fused city. At the terrace seating of an Earth café, an elf woman shows a scroll inscribed with runes to an Earth student. In the background, a dwarf craftsman assembles a spirit-powered device alongside an Earth engineer. Street signs feature both Japanese and elvish script. Warm afternoon light, golden hour, warm color temperature, cinematic, film grain. Narration (low, resonant male Japanese voice): "Beastkin brought keen senses, and dwarves brought engineering. Each contribution reshaped everyday life." White Japanese subtitles at the bottom of the screen: "Beastkin brought keen senses, and dwarves brought engineering. Each contribution reshaped everyday life." Shot 2-3 (10s–15s) Wide shot, slow tilt up. A panoramic view of the fused city at dusk. Elven vines and dwarven gear decorations beautifully entwine the framework of Tokyo Tower, forming a magnificent hybrid structure. At the base in the plaza, Earth humans and elves run stalls together; in the sky, silhouettes of angel-like wings gracefully circle, while beastkin children race around with Earth children. Lighting blending sunset oranges with the pale blue glow of elven magic, a grand sense of scale, cinematic 4K, film grain. Narration (low, resonant male Japanese voice): "Where magic and science intertwine—a new world begins to turn." White Japanese subtitles at the bottom of the screen: "Where magic and science intertwine—a new world begins to turn."

prompts.display_text: A lone explorer with a headlamp enters a vast arctic ice cave, crystalline blue walls glittering in the narrow beam of light. Slow push-in follows through the cave entrance, each step crunching on frost, breath visible in the freezing air, the headlamp illuminating intricate ice formations that stretch into darkness. A deep rumble shakes loose ice from the ceiling. The camera shifts to urgent shaky handheld, swinging wildly as the explorer spins around, the headlamp catching glimpses of something massive moving in the shadows, sickly pale green bioluminescent veins pulsing along the cave walls. The perspective snaps to a wide static shot as the creature emerges fully, a towering insectoid horror covered in translucent ice-like chitin, green light pulsing from within its body, dwarfing the terrified explorer. Glacial blue ice environment, bioluminescent creature design, horror lighting. 16:9 cinematic.

Stable shot, clear readability, calm before the attack. 2s-6s: Character 1 launches a special high-speed move. Use "Video1" as the movement reference. Character 1 moves at lightning speed, rapidly dashing back and forth across the screen. Create elongated afterimage streaks, intense motion blur, smear frames, and fast directional trails. The real body is almost impossible to track.T he movement should feel explosive, aggressive, and extremely fast. 6s-8s: Character 2 turns his head left and right, trying to follow the attack. He is tense and alert, scanning both sides of the screen. The afterimage streaks keep flashing around him at high speed. 8s-11s: Character 2 executes a decisive sword slash that intercepts one of the high-speed afterimage streaks. The strike cuts through the elongated moving mass effect and breaks the technique. At that moment, Character 1 is forced out of the special high-speed form from"Video1" .The afterimage collapses and reveals the real body of Character 1. Character 1 falls to the ground after being stopped mid-technique. prompts.display_text: Cinematic 16:9 ultra-detailed fantasy battle trailer in the mythical realm of Aetherion. Massive floating islands of glowing crystal and ancient moss-covered ruins drift through endless golden skies. A colossal ancient dragon named Eldrath leads a desperate alliance of silver-armored elves and griffin riders to defend the Heart Crystal against the Obsidian Sorcerer Lord Vespera and his legion of shadow-wreathed demons. Explosive wide aerial shots and dynamic tracking camera capture the chaos: lightning storms, glowing arrows, griffin dive-bombing, and swirling black vortexes. Emotional close-ups of Eldrath and the half-elf sorceress Lirael as they combine powers in a blinding supernova of light. Hyper-realistic cinematic lighting, dramatic color grading, 8K, film grain, in the style of Guillermo del Toro and Peter Jackson.

prompts.display_text: cinematic disaster epic, single continuous shot, no cuts, no montage, no multiple-camera language, documentary-style realism, IMAX-scale clarity, natural film grain, high dynamic range, physically accurate daylight, realistic atmospheric perspective, authentic reflections, volumetric dust and smoke, true-to-life city lighting and environmental behavior. A real modern Chinese megacity in daytime: high-rise towers, elevated roads, broad avenues, plaza spaces, parked and moving cars, street signs, glass facades, all with the look of genuine live-action footage. The shot begins with chaos already underway: a colossal ancient giant python, far larger and more terrifying than a realistic anaconda, is violently rampaging through the city. Its thick muscular body whips between streets and buildings with horrifying speed and weight, crushing cars, smashing roadside structures, wrapping around building facades, lunging at fleeing crowds. People run in panic, vehicles collide, glass shards, concrete dust, torn billboards and debris fill the air. Everything feels like a real catastrophic emergency captured in one uninterrupted shot. Then the sky suddenly shifts. Clouds are torn apart at high speed and a gigantic Chinese dragon dives down from the heavens. This is not a cartoon dragon and has no wings. It is a believable colossal Eastern dragon, a mysterious real biological creature of the natural world, long serpentine body, no wings, powerful limbs, realistic muscles, bones, scale overlap, weathered reflective scales, layered shadows, natural skin tension, believable mass and inertia. As it moves, its body undulates through the air with convincing aerodynamic resistance, whiskers and mane trailing in turbulent airflow, subtle cloud vapor and disturbed mist forming around it. The dragon descends like a guardian over the city, precisely targeting the giant python below. In one continuous shot, the two beasts engage in a brutal close-range fight among skyscrapers and over shattered streets. The python coils, strikes, and thrashes between buildings; the Chinese dragon tears away constriction with its claws, coils around the serpent to overpower it, and finally bites hard into the python's upper body and neck. With overwhelming force, the dragon drags the struggling serpent up from the city ruins and lifts it into the sky. In the final moments, the wingless Chinese dragon powers upward by driving its long body through the air, carrying the still-writhing python away into the distant sky. Below, terrified citizens stop running and stare upward in stunned awe. The ruined city remains filled with smoke, debris, and sunlight cutting through haze, creating a final epic image of a divine dragon saving humanity. Keep the entire piece grounded in real-world physics, realistic destruction, believable scale, terrifying weight, restrained camera behavior, immersive live-action disaster authenticity, not stylized, not fantasy-cartoon, not game-like, absolutely photorealistic.

prompts.display_text: cinematic romance, slow-burn emotional tone, one man and one woman only, both adults in their mid-20s, western-style leads, casual luxury wardrobe, dark quiet apartment living room at night, refined romantic tension, natural lip sync, no subtitles, no text on screen. Character continuity: Female lead: adult western woman, mid-20s, elegant natural beauty, long brunette hair with soft loose waves, minimal makeup, emotionally guarded but faintly amused, seated on the sofa. Outfit: soft ivory off-shoulder knit sweater, dark straight-leg jeans, barefoot, understated jewelry. Male lead: adult western man, mid-20s, handsome refined features, slightly messy dark hair, thin metal-frame glasses, calm warm expression. Outfit: charcoal knit sweater over a white T-shirt, dark trousers, sleeves pushed once, relaxed but polished. Environment: Upscale apartment living room, soft sofa, low coffee table, one warm lamp, deep evening shadows, muted neutral palette, intimate silence, shallow depth of field, premium film texture, modern romantic realism. 0-3s: Wide-to-medium slow push-in. She sits in one corner of the sofa with arms folded, looking away. He crosses the room and sits on the edge of the coffee table facing her, leaving a small respectful distance. Hold the silence and tension. 3-6s: Medium close-up on the man. He studies her face, voice low, calm, almost smiling: “I tried very hard to have an ordinary evening.” 6-9s: Close-up on the woman. She turns her eyes to him at last, cool but intrigued, with the faintest teasing edge: “And how did that go?” 9-12s: Close-up on the man. He lets out a quiet breath, gaze steady. He reaches toward a loose strand near her cheek, stopping just before touching: “Poorly. You were in all of it.” 12-15s: Side two-shot. She lightly catches his wrist before he pulls away, not rejecting him, only holding him there. A small unwilling smile appears: “That is not helping me stay angry.” Hold on the shared gaze, the restrained smile, and the unresolved tenderness. Motion and style rules: Slow elegant camera movement, meaningful pauses, micro-expressions, lingering eye contact, almost-touch tension, realistic hand motion, restrained acting, no kneeling, no raised voices, no crying, no extra characters, no exaggerated gestures, no waxy skin, no stiff posing, premium romantic realism, emotionally charged final frame.

15-second cinematic romance, slow-burn emotional tone, one man and one woman only, both adults in their mid-20s, western-style leads, casual luxury wardrobe, dark quiet apartment living room at night, refined romantic tension, natural lip sync, no subtitles, no text on screen.

Character continuity:
Female lead: adult western woman, mid-20s, elegant natural beauty, long brunette hair with soft loose waves, minimal makeup, emotionally guarded but faintly amused, seated on the sofa. Outfit: soft ivory off-shoulder knit sweater, dark straight-leg jeans, barefoot, understated jewelry.
Male lead: adult western man, mid-20s, handsome refined features, slightly messy dark hair, thin metal-frame glasses, calm warm expression. Outfit: charcoal knit sweater over a white T-shirt, dark trousers, sleeves pushed once, relaxed but polished.

Environment:
Upscale apartment living room, soft sofa, low coffee table, one warm lamp, deep evening shadows, muted neutral palette, intimate silence, shallow depth of field, premium film texture, modern romantic realism.

0-3s:
Wide-to-medium slow push-in. She sits in one corner of the sofa with arms folded, looking away. He crosses the room and sits on the edge of the coffee table facing her, leaving a small respectful distance. Hold the silence and tension.

3-6s:
Medium close-up on the man. He studies her face, voice low, calm, almost smiling:
“I tried very hard to have an ordinary evening.”

6-9s:
Close-up on the woman. She turns her eyes to him at last, cool but intrigued, with the faintest teasing edge:
“And how did that go?”

9-12s:
Close-up on the man. He lets out a quiet breath, gaze steady. He reaches toward a loose strand near her cheek, stopping just before touching:
“Poorly. You were in all of it.”

12-15s:
Side two-shot. She lightly catches his wrist before he pulls away, not rejecting him, only holding him there. A small unwilling smile appears:
“That is not helping me stay angry.”
Hold on the shared gaze, the restrained smile, and the unresolved tenderness.

Motion and style rules:
Slow elegant camera movement, meaningful pauses, micro-expressions, lingering eye contact, almost-touch tension, realistic hand motion, restrained acting, no kneeling, no raised voices, no crying, no extra characters, no exaggerated gestures, no waxy skin, no stiff posing, premium romantic realism, emotionally charged final frame.
prompts.author: @IamEmily2050

prompts.display_text: : First-person perspective (POV), 8K hyper-realistic, 60fps fluid motion, dark fantasy aesthetic, cinematic lighting, 9:16 vertical aspect ratio. [00:00 - 00:05] SEGMENT 1: The Awakening (The Hook) "POV shot. Looking down at the user's hand (as seen in @image1 ), where glowing blue and black veins pulse with energy. The hand is gripping a swirling black and violet energy orb. The hand crushes the orb with a heavy grip. Instantly, a massive shockwave of purple lightning and dark smoke explodes outward. From the shadows on the ground, dozens of spectral, knight-like silhouettes with glowing eyes rise and kneel before the camera. The setting is a dark, ruined stone dungeon." [00:05 - 00:10] SEGMENT 2: The Onslaught & The Boss (The Body) "Fast-paced POV combat. The camera moves forward rapidly as the user's hand wields a jagged, glowing obsidian dagger, slashing through waves of grey stone monsters that crumble into dust upon impact. The shadow knights from segment one fight alongside the user. Suddenly, the ground shakes, and a colossal, 30-foot demonic titan with multiple red eyes and jagged armor emerges from the darkness, letting out a silent, earth-shaking roar. The user raises their left hand, charging a massive violet aura." [00:10 - 00:15] SEGMENT 3: The Final Surge (The Climax) "Extreme POV close-up. The user's hand reaches toward the giant titan. A colossal spectral shadow-giant manifests behind the camera, mimicking the user's movement. All the shadow energy in the room condenses into the user's palm. The user fires a massive beam of pure abyssal purple energy that pierces through the titan's chest. The titan slowly disintegrates into black ash and embers, its red eyes fading as it collapses. The screen shakes with a heavy bass effect as the purple veins on the user's arm glow one last time before fading to black." Cinematic gender transformation sequence: start with a male figure in a dark, mysterious environment, subtle seductive tension in body language. Begin slow transformation with close-ups on physical change: jawline softens, shoulders narrow, hips subtly shift, hair lengthens and flows. Use dramatic lighting and dynamic camera movement, soft glowing particles, smooth skin morphing, luminous eyes, halo effects, ethereal atmosphere. Add seductive emotional nuance without explicit content — lingering gaze, graceful posture, fluid silhouette, magnetic presence. Sequence seamless and cinematic, slow motion transformation blending male to female form, film-like color grading, atmospheric shadows and highlights, polished visual flow, intense but elegant aesthetic. A cinematic, hyper-realistic vertical shot of a male-to-female shapeshifter transformation in a dimly lit luxurious room. The left half of the body remains rugged and masculine, while the right half is transforming into a graceful, elegant female form. Skin ripples like liquid silk at the intersection, and clothing morphs seamlessly from a masculine jacket into flowing attire. Dramatic low-key lighting emphasizes contours, intricate textures, and the surreal transformation. Dynamic expression of surprise and awe. High contrast, 8k resolution. prompts.display_text: Setting: Dark fortress interior with towering metal structures. Teal/cyan illumination leaks through gaps between massive pillars. Metallic reflective floor. Character: White-haired girl with red eyes. Mechanical angel in white armor plating. Wings on her back emit blue energy. [1: HIGH-SPEED FLIGHT WITH BOOST TRAILS] Extreme top-down angle. A tiny white light point zigzags across the fortress trailing blue energy lines. Concentric sonic-boom rings expand at each turning point. Wind-pressure particles scatter off the metal floor below. [2: CHARACTER CLOSE-UP → WEAPON AIM → FIRE → EXTREME FACE CLOSE-UP] Hard cut to low-angle close-up — the angel with wings spread, energy blades aimed forward in firing stance. She fires. Then the camera begins an agonizingly slow, deliberate zoom toward her face. It continues until only her glowing red eyes fill the entire frame. Pure intimidation. [3: BOOSTER ADJUSTMENT → CHARGE → ENERGY MAX → BOOST] From the red-eye extreme close-up, blue energy vents intensify in stages — blue → bright white. The entire screen whites out. An explosive flash of energy release. [4: HIGH-SPEED FLIGHT WITH BOOST TRAILS] Immediately after whiteout she streaks across the fortress at extreme speed. Blue beam trails cut diagonally across the frame. A targeting reticle flickers for an instant. [5: KICK TOWARD CAMERA] She dives from above and drives a kick straight at the camera — extreme low-angle POV from the target's perspective. Her armored leg fills the frame. Wing jets fire for added impact. [6: SAME KICK FROM DIFFERENT ANGLE → EXPLOSION] The same kick replayed from a different camera angle. On contact: cyan/white explosion → thick energy dust cloud → the dust lights up from inside as a secondary blast erupts. [7: CLOSE-UP → WEAPON AIM → AUTO-TARGETING → FULL BARRAGE] Dust clears to reveal the angel with all wings fully deployed. Each blue energy blade independently auto-adjusts its aim — blue/purple electrical arcs crackle as targeting locks on. Then every blade fires at once — continuous rapid-fire barrage, the entire screen consumed by cyan/white explosions. [8: BOOSTER ADJUSTMENT → CHARGE → MAX BOOST → HIGH-SPEED FLIGHT] Energy vents charge up again in stages. Blue → white → whiteout → explosive jet blast. She rockets away trailing blue energy across the fortress. [9: WEAPON READY POSE] Against the teal fortress backdrop she holds a static pose, energy blades aimed forward, wings fully spread. A faint blue aura shimmers around her.

prompt:
Setting: Dark fortress interior with towering metal structures. Teal/cyan illumination leaks through gaps between massive pillars. Metallic reflective floor.

Character: White-haired girl with red eyes. Mechanical angel in white armor plating. Wings on her back emit blue energy.

[1: HIGH-SPEED FLIGHT WITH BOOST TRAILS]

Extreme top-down angle. A tiny white light point zigzags across the fortress trailing blue energy lines. Concentric sonic-boom rings expand at each turning point. Wind-pressure particles scatter off the metal floor below.

[2: CHARACTER CLOSE-UP → WEAPON AIM → FIRE → EXTREME FACE CLOSE-UP]

Hard cut to low-angle close-up — the angel with wings spread, energy blades aimed forward in firing stance. She fires. Then the camera begins an agonizingly slow, deliberate zoom toward her face. It continues until only her glowing red eyes fill the entire frame. Pure intimidation.

[3: BOOSTER ADJUSTMENT → CHARGE → ENERGY MAX → BOOST]

From the red-eye extreme close-up, blue energy vents intensify in stages — blue → bright white. The entire screen whites out. An explosive flash of energy release.

[4: HIGH-SPEED FLIGHT WITH BOOST TRAILS]

Immediately after whiteout she streaks across the fortress at extreme speed. Blue beam trails cut diagonally across the frame. A targeting reticle flickers for an instant.

[5: KICK TOWARD CAMERA]

She dives from above and drives a kick straight at the camera — extreme low-angle POV from the target's perspective. Her armored leg fills the frame. Wing jets fire for added impact.

[6: SAME KICK FROM DIFFERENT ANGLE → EXPLOSION]

The same kick replayed from a different camera angle. On contact: cyan/white explosion → thick energy dust cloud → the dust lights up from inside as a secondary blast erupts.

[7: CLOSE-UP → WEAPON AIM → AUTO-TARGETING → FULL BARRAGE]

Dust clears to reveal the angel with all wings fully deployed. Each blue energy blade independently auto-adjusts its aim — blue/purple electrical arcs crackle as targeting locks on. Then every blade fires at once — continuous rapid-fire barrage, the entire screen consumed by cyan/white explosions.

[8: BOOSTER ADJUSTMENT → CHARGE → MAX BOOST → HIGH-SPEED FLIGHT]

Energy vents charge up again in stages. Blue → white → whiteout → explosive jet blast. She rockets away trailing blue energy across the fortress.

[9: WEAPON READY POSE]

Against the teal fortress backdrop she holds a static pose, energy blades aimed forward, wings fully spread. A faint blue aura shimmers around her.

prompts.display_text: NASA APOLLO SPACESUIT A7L "WORN ON ANOTHER WORLD" DNA: July 20, 1969. 102 hours, 45 minutes, 40 seconds into the mission. One small step. Arri Alexa 65. Ultra-wide. Grain progressive — starts clinical-clean, ends at maximum as the lunar surface appears. Key light: cold fluorescent Mission Control white. Secondary: harsh unfiltered solar light — no atmosphere to diffuse it. Flares: none in the lab sequence. One single overwhelming flare as the visor catches unfiltered sunlight on the lunar surface. Background: white clean room → vacuum of space → lunar surface at Tranquility Base. 00:00–00:02 · THE LAYERS A single thread of nylon being measured under a magnifying glass by a white-gloved technician's hand. Then: cut to the 21 layers of the A7L suit being assembled simultaneously — each layer materializing and wrapping the suit form: the liquid cooling garment first, its tubes threading through the fabric like a vascular system. Then the pressure bladder. Then the restraint layer. Then the thermal micrometeorite garment. Each layer distinct, each critical. Camera cross-section view through all 21 layers simultaneously. 00:02–00:04.5 · THE HELMET Speed 30%. The polycarbonate helmet shell forms — perfectly spherical, flawless. The visor assembly drops in: the gold-coated visor — 24-karat gold, 0.0002 inches thick — pressing over the outer shell. Camera macro on the gold surface: it reflects everything in warm gold — including us. The neck ring locks with a quarter-turn — the mechanism designed to never, under any circumstances, fail. 00:04.5–00:07 · PRESSURIZATION Speed 8%. The most important moment. Air flowing into the suit — the pressure building to 3.75 psi. Camera inside the suit as it pressurizes: the fabric stiffening, the gloves expanding slightly. Every seal tested by the pressure itself. The suit becomes a world — a personal atmosphere, the only thing between a human being and the void. 00:07–00:10 · THE CLEAN ROOM Speed 15%. The suited figure — complete — standing in the white clean room under brutal fluorescent light. Technicians moving around it in blurred background. The suit reads in extraordinary detail: the layers visible at the seams, the connector ports, the PLSS backpack life support system mounting points. A visor drops over the helmet. The astronaut disappears inside. 00:10–00:13 · TRANQUILITY BASE Speed 3%. The surface of the Moon. The suit boot pressing into lunar regolith in ultra-slow motion — the print forming in dust that has not been disturbed in 4.5 billion years. Camera at surface level — the boot print in sharp focus, the horizon of the Moon in the background, the Earth hanging above it, the size of a marble. The suit in the background, the gold visor catching unfiltered solar light. The single most overwhelming flare of any film in this collection — total, white, sacred. 00:13–00:14.5 · THE REVEAL Speed 1% — absolute stillness. The A7L floating in the void — the Earth behind it at distance. The gold visor reflects the Earth. The Earth reflected in the suit designed to walk on the Moon. Everything is contained in this one reflection. 00:14.5–00:15 · END CARD Silence — total. Then a single radio crackle. NASA worm logo. "Worn once. Changed everything." No grain — this moment is too clear, too real. Hold. Fade.

prompts.display_text: : CHARACTERS: Define one figure in a Japanese festival mask with a staff at the curb, recoiling pedestrians at the sidewalk edge, and a colossal serpentine abyssal titan with a ridge-backed silhouette and city-scale mass that rises after the second strike. STAGE: Set Shibuya Crossing at night after rain with LED billboards, reflective asphalt, moving traffic, and clear geography before the street turns to liquid, keeps swallowing traffic, and opens beneath the masked figure. EMOTIONAL TARGET: Build from dread into epic ascent. COLOR LOGIC: Neon Noir TIMELINE: 00:00.0: Open on a high wide over the curb lanes at Shibuya Crossing. Hold the figure in a Japanese festival mask still against the crowd blur. SFX: crossing beeps, shoe chatter. 00:01.2: Hard cut to a 50mm dolly push on the Japanese mask. Let billboard light crawl across its lacquered surface. SFX: city wash narrows. 00:02.4: Insert cut to the right hand striking the asphalt with the staff for the first hit. Show the impact point clearly. SFX: wood crack, low hum. 00:03.6: Match cut to a ripple blasting through reflected neon on the road surface. Keep the ring centered and fast. SFX: sub-bass pulse. 00:04.8: Smash cut to a 28mm low wide. Let the asphalt soften and turn viscous around the first impact point before the liquid begins to spread. SFX: tar tear, liquid surge. 00:06.0: Hard cut to a front three-quarter wide as Shibuya lane paint slowly sags under the creeping surface. Drive the liquid outward in a heavy crawl. SFX: bubbling drain, horn choke. 00:07.2: Hard cut to moving cars starting to drop nose-first and sink mid-motion as the softened street finally gives way under them. Hold the delayed weight shift long enough to read it. SFX: horn choke, metal groan, glass rattle. 00:08.4: Hard cut wider as pedestrians recoil along the sidewalk edge and more moving cars keep dropping into the black surface behind them. Keep the masked figure centered on an unbroken patch of liquid. SFX: shouts, wave slap, horn choke. 00:09.6: Cut on action to a 35mm push-in. Let the masked figure plant the staff into that black surface for the second strike without breaking calm while cars continue sinking at the edges of frame. SFX: bass hit, rain hiss, metal groan. 00:10.8: Hard cut to a slow 85mm orbit. Reveal the black surface doming under the masked figure as the collapse continues behind them, then split it open in a tight circle around their feet. SFX: deep groan, resonance, distant impacts. 00:12.0: Land on a 24mm crane pullback. Reveal a colossal serpentine abyssal titan rising through that opening directly under the masked figure and lifting them on its head above the liquefied Shibuya Crossing while its long ridge-backed body coils through the flooded intersection below. SFX: rain roar, vertical surge, ominous note. 00:13.2: Continue into a full 360 orbit around the serpentine abyssal titan and the masked figure high above the crossing. Keep the city spinning below them while the titan's body coils through the black street and the ascent holds steady. SFX: rain hiss, deep resonance, distant horns. EXCLUDE: Avoid drifting facial identity, cartoon liquid physics, unreadable lane continuity, text overlays, and camera HUD.

prompts.display_text: Shot on ALEXA 65mm anamorphic lens. Photorealistic cinematic quality. Aspect ratio 2.39:1 widescreen. Teal shadows, warm amber highlights. Film grain. Rain-soaked New York street at night. Neon signs, streetlights reflecting on wet asphalt. Steam rising from manholes. Lens flares, motion blur. Dolby Vision HDR. 0.0s–2.5s: Extreme low-angle tracking shot — a lone female fighter strides down a narrow NYC street, rain pouring heavily. Leather jacket soaked, hair slicked back and dripping. Heels echo faintly on wet pavement. Camera tracks backward with subtle shake. Yellow taxi lights streak across puddles. Figures step out from alleyways and fire escapes, slowly surrounding her. She tilts her head, cracks her knuckles — calm, fearless expression. 2.6s–5.0s: Whip-pan — first attacker lunges. TIME REMAP: slow-motion as she pivots smoothly, dodging and delivering a sharp elbow strike. Water sprays on impact. Her jacket snaps with the motion. Another attacker crashes into a stack of trash bags and metal bins. Sparks flicker from a flickering streetlight overhead. 5.1s–7.5s: Drone shot — overhead view as she moves fluidly through multiple opponents. SLOW MOTION: precise kicks and spins land cleanly, bodies sliding across rain-slick asphalt. Steam swirls under golden streetlights. One attacker swings a bat — she catches it mid-swing, twists, and disarms them effortlessly. 7.6s–10.0s: 360° orbital shot — she leaps into a spinning kick, taking down two attackers at once. Camera circles her as another rushes from behind. Without turning, she blocks and counters instantly. Breath visible in the cold night air. Each strike hits in sync with a rising cinematic score. 10.1s–13.0s: First-person POV — the final opponent charges. SMASH CUT: rapid, close-range exchange in slow motion. Her final punch lands clean. Silence falls. Rain continues to pour. Slow push-in — she stands alone in the empty street, adjusts her jacket sleeve, exhales steadily. Low-angle shot. Eyes locked forward. Unshaken.

prompts.display_text: INFINITE FALL — Beer Catch [image1] Guy: lean young man, wavy blonde hair, thin glasses, black short-sleeve open shirt, dark grey pinstripe wide-leg trousers, large silver belt buckle, brown leather loafers, arm tattoos, silver bracelets. Expression: not panicked — annoyed at the bottle, nothing more. IMAX 65mm aggressive handheld — camera itself in freefall with him, shaking slightly with air resistance, never still. Fast orbital cuts, whip pans between angles, camera sometimes rushing past him at speed. Everything blown violently upward: hair, jacket, trouser legs, shirt — continuous strong upward wind throughout. The visual grammar of terminal velocity. Sound FX: constant roaring wind, fabric snapping, bottle tumbling, liquid sloshing. Environment: pure white infinite void — no ground, no ceiling, no horizon. Just white in all directions. A brown glass beer bottle tumbling slowly in freefall beside him, liquid sloshing inside, just out of reach. negative: no ground, no slow camera, no calm floating — this is a violent fall The entire sequence is one continuous fall at full speed. Camera whips around him — bug's eye from directly below looking up at him shrinking then rushing toward camera, overhead looking straight down at him, 10mm close pass inches from his face with the wind tearing at his hair and glasses, Dutch angle tracking his full body as he reaches. The bottle tumbles just past his fingers — he repositions fast, body rotating in the fall, reaching again. His glasses nearly torn off by the wind, he pushes them back with one hand without stopping reaching with the other. The fall feels violent and fast — not peaceful zero gravity, not serene floating. The roaring wind is constant and loud. His clothes are being destroyed by the air resistance — shirt billowing completely open, trouser legs flattened against his legs then snapping outward. He finally grabs the bottle in one hard grip — fingers closing around the neck. He pulls it against the wind to his lips. Takes a long defiant sip. Wind still roaring. Hair still destroyed. Glasses still crooked. Camera does one final fast orbit around him — close, aggressive, whipping past. He lowers the bottle. Looks directly into the camera lens from centimeters away. Completely unbothered. Wind roar continues. Cut to black. IMAX/anamorphic, violent freefall camera, aggressive orbital handheld, constant roaring wind, infinite white void, 4K Music: Flex It - MPH, y3kfae

prompts.display_text: FORMAT: 15s / 148 BPM / ONE CONTINUOUS SHOT / 3D action-comedy / Pixar-Kung Fu Hustle homage SUBJECTS: Young man, torn t-shirt. Girlfriend, floral dress. Boss, black suit. Blockers: Landlady in nightgown, Tailor, Mahjong duo, Coolie porter, Landlord in pajamas. Pixar-proportioned: rubbery limbs, wire-fu physics. PROPS: Rainbow lollipop, silver hatchet, red slipper, cigarette, brass forearm rings, mahjong tiles, wooden pole. ENVIRONMENT: 1930s walled tenement block: dusty courtyard, tight corridors, cascading balconies. Laundry lines, hanging signs. Dusty golden light. MOOD: Wire-fu comedic mayhem. Impossible physics, deadpan reactions. COLOR LOGIC: Golden Hour Look CAMERA: One uninterrupted Steadicam event. Tracks the young man continuously, pulling back as he runs, swinging to frame each blocker without cutting. 24mm spherical lens. SCENE: 1. Steadicam starts MCU. Young man hands girlfriend the lollipop. 2. Boss steps in raising the hatchet. Young man leaps ten feet backward. Camera pulls back fast into the alley to lead his sprint. 3. Landlady steps in, swinging a red slipper in a blurry tornado of strikes. Young man slides under the swings on both knees. The wind force of her slaps blasts the Boss backward. 4. Camera tracks backward into a corridor. Tailor blocks, brass rings clinking. Young man deflects rapid punches, spinning the Tailor into a pillar as camera glides past. 5. Mahjong duo attacks with synchronized rapid-fire palm strikes. Young man parries both simultaneously using the back of his hands, then does a wire-fu backflip twenty feet up. Camera tilts up as they crash into their tile table. 6. Camera levels on a balcony. Coolie thrusts a wooden pole like a spear. Slow motion: Young man deflects the tip with a single knuckle. Normal speed: he spins the pole away, plants it, and pole-vaults over the roof. 7. Camera tracks him landing on a vertical brick wall. Three thugs launch flying kicks. Young man runs horizontally along the wall, blocking their kicks with rapid shin-blocks in mid-air. 8. Camera drops to floor level. Boss charges, swinging a wild hatchet combo. Young man side-steps, traps the wrist, steps directly onto the falling blade, and leaps off the Boss's head. 9. Camera pulls back through the gate. Landlord attacks with heavy tai-chi pushes. Young man engages in a lightning-fast sticky-hands exchange, redirecting the Landlord's momentum to spin him away before running past. 10. Camera stops EWS on open street. Boss and thugs crash into the Landlady in a dust cloud. Girlfriend waves the lollipop from a window. He waves back, running away. SFX: Acoustic guitar opens. Slipper slaps beat 3, brass clink 4, rapid palm smacks and tile crash 5, slow-mo whoosh and wood clack 6, fast wall steps and kick thuds 7, metallic ping 8, heavy clothing swoosh 9, massive dust boom 10 with guitar reprise.

prompts.display_text: cinematic horror. Jakarta KRL Commuter Line station at night, Sudirman station platform, harsh yellow-white fluorescent overhead lighting, worn dirty tiled floor, blue KRL train car parked at platform, Indonesian signage on walls. A young woman in [reference outfit] poses next to the train car taking a selfie, smiling. On the train wall behind her, a large advertisement poster shows a beautiful woman's face. The poster surface begins to ripple and crack. Long black wet hair pushes through the glossy paper. A pale hand with black fingernails tears through. A kuntilanak in torn white kebaya crawls out of the poster completely, feet never touching the ground, long hair covering her face, head tilted at an unnatural angle. Bystanders on the platform scream and scatter. The woman drops her phone and runs. POV handheld tracking shot, she sprints through the platform, quick glance back, the kuntilanak glides at impossible speed closing the distance, hair flowing, white kebaya tattered. Emergency lights flicker red. Train doors slam shut. Dead end. Wide shot the woman presses her back against the closed train doors, nowhere to go. The kuntilanak stops. Slowly raises her head. Two hollow black eyes beneath the hair. Shaky handheld cam, motion blur, high contrast shadows, horror aesthetic, cinematic.

prompts.display_text: Formula” Most people write vibes. Seedance wants structure. Use this every time: Subject → Action → Camera → Style If you skip camera → you get random motion If you skip action → you get stiff clips 2. The “Camera is King” rule Seedance is basically a camera simulator. Instead of: “girl walking in city” Say: “tracking shot, slow dolly-in, 35mm lens, shallow depth of field” That alone upgrades output quality massively 3. The “Don’t Describe the Image” hack If you’re using a reference image: DO NOT re-describe it Only describe motion + changes Otherwise the model “reinterprets” your image and ruins it 4. The “Motion Intensity” trick Seedance doesn’t infer speed. “car drives” = boring “car accelerates aggressively, motion blur, tires screeching” = cinematic You have to explicitly define energy levels

The “4-Part Prompt Formula” 

Most people write vibes. Seedance wants structure.

Use this every time:

Subject → Action → Camera → Style

If you skip camera → you get random motion

If you skip action → you get stiff clips

2. The “Camera is King” rule 

Seedance is basically a camera simulator.

Instead of: “girl walking in city”

Say: “tracking shot, slow dolly-in, 35mm lens, shallow depth of field”

That alone upgrades output quality massively

3. The “Don’t Describe the Image” hack 

If you’re using a reference image:

DO NOT re-describe it

Only describe motion + changes

Otherwise the model “reinterprets” your image and ruins it

4. The “Motion Intensity” trick 

Seedance doesn’t infer speed.

“car drives” = boring

“car accelerates aggressively, motion blur, tires screeching” = cinematic

You have to explicitly define energy levels

prompts.display_text: used in Seedance 2.0 FORMAT: 15s / MULTI-CUT / 5 BEATS / VIRAL EMOTIONAL TWIST SUBJECTS: A small robot the size of a shoebox, boxy body made of dented brushed aluminum with visible rivets and scratches, one flickering blue LED eye (left) and one steady warm orange LED eye (right), two stubby telescoping arms with three-pronged claw hands, and tank treads that squeak when moving. Its chest panel has a cracked circular speaker grille. It moves with jerky stop-start motions and tilts its whole body to express emotion. A single wilted daisy in a cracked terra cotta pot — this is the visual anchor throughout. Stylized 3D quality animation with tactile material rendering, squash-and-stretch on the robot's body, and exaggerated emotional eye animation. ENVIRONMENT: An abandoned rooftop greenhouse at golden hour. Shattered glass panels let warm sunset light pour in at low angles. Overgrown dead vines cover rusted metal shelving. Cracked concrete floor with patches of dry soil. One corner has a small puddle of collected rainwater reflecting the orange sky. Dust motes and tiny pollen particles float in the light beams. The city skyline is visible through broken glass — distant but soft, out of focus. STYLE: Stylized 3D animation, subsurface rendering on organic matter, physically accurate metal wear on the robot. Warm desaturated palette — dusty oranges, faded greens, soft rust tones. Cinematic depth of field with golden hour lens flares. Gentle film grain. MOOD: Lonely tenderness building to quiet joy. Bittersweet but ultimately hopeful. COLOR LOGIC: Sunset Rust — warm amber light, cool blue-grey shadows, pops of green only at the very end. ⸻ 0:00–0:02 · The Discovery Wide shot, 35mm, low angle from floor level. The greenhouse is still, bathed in golden light. The tiny robot rolls in through a gap in the broken glass wall, treads squeaking. It stops. Its mismatched eyes scan the space — the blue one flickers nervously. It spots something offscreen. Cut to insert close-up, 85mm: the wilted daisy in its cracked pot, sitting alone on a shelf in a beam of light. One brown petal falls. SFX: tread squeak, servo whir, gentle wind through broken glass, petal tap on concrete. 0:02–0:05 · The Attempt Medium shot, 50mm. The robot rolls to the shelf and extends one arm toward the pot. Too short. It stretches — whole body tilting forward on its treads, arm telescoping to maximum with a strained ratcheting sound. Fingertips barely touch the pot. It nudges the pot off the shelf and catches it with both claws in a clumsy fumble — nearly drops it, recovers, hugs it tight against its chest panel. Its orange eye glows slightly brighter. SFX: ratchet extension, ceramic scrape, fumble clatter, catch clank, relieved servo sigh. 0:05–0:08 · The Problem Close-up, 85mm, on the daisy. It is completely wilted — drooping, brown, dry. The robot tilts its body sideways examining it. It pokes one petal with a claw tip. The petal crumbles to dust. The robot recoils. Its blue eye flickers faster — distressed. It looks around the greenhouse frantically, body swiveling left and right. Then it spots the puddle of rainwater in the corner. Both eyes lock on it. SFX: petal crumble, distressed beep sequence, servo whip-pan, hopeful double chirp. 0:08–0:12 · The Gift Medium tracking shot, 35mm, following the robot as it rolls carefully toward the puddle, pot clutched tight. It arrives at the edge. Problem: it has no way to scoop water. One beat of stillness. Then it tilts the entire pot and dips the dry soil directly into the shallow puddle — gentle, slow, deliberate. Water seeps into the cracked terra cotta. The robot holds it there. Sunset light catches the water surface, throwing rippled golden reflections across the robot's dented body. Its speaker grille crackles and emits a faint broken hum — it is trying to sing. SFX: water absorption, gentle ripple, crackling hum melody attempt, distant wind. 0:12–0:15 · The Bloom Close-up, 85mm. The robot lifts the pot from the water and holds it at eye level. Nothing happens. One still beat. Then — a single green leaf unfurls from the stem, small and bright against all the brown. The robot's blue eye stops flickering and holds steady for the first time. Both eyes glow warm together. It pulls the pot closer to its chest. Camera slowly pulls back to a wide shot, 35mm. The tiny robot sits alone in the vast greenhouse, sunset light wrapping around it, holding one small pot with one new leaf. SFX: leaf unfurl whisper, both eyes hum in harmony, warm music swell, golden hour silence.

prompts.display_text: Scene 1: The Alarm Smack ( - . | Duration: 2 sec) Action: The same Character is sleeping soundly in a real bed, her eyes fully closed. She has messy red hair, a sleep mask pushed up on her forehead, and is wearing pajamas. The loud sound of an alarm begins. The camera trembles and shakes slightly, simulating phone vibration. Transition (The Portal): Startled by the sound, she wakes up abruptly, sitting up fast with an irritated expression. At the peak of her sitting motion, the 'portal' effect activates, visibly 'sucking' her inward, immediately transforming into a rapid portal motion blur with a warp/whoosh distortion effect. Scene 2: Landing & Brushing Teeth (.0 - .6 | Duration: 0.6 sec) Action: The same Character. The portal transition ends as she lands perfectly seated on a spinning backless stool at her vanity. She is still in her pajamas. As she spins to face the camera, she is already brushing her teeth with an electric toothbrush. Transition: Immediate continuous spin away. Scene 3: Hair Brushing (0:2.6 - .2 | Duration: 0.6 sec) Action: The same Character. She spins back to face the camera. She is now vigorously brushing her red hair with a hairbrush. Transition: Immediate continuous spin away. Scene 4: Eye Makeup (.2 - .8 | Duration: 0.6 sec) Action: The same Character. She spins back to face the camera. She is quickly applying mascara or eyeshadow with an applicator, looking focused. Transition: Immediate continuous spin away. Scene 5: Fully Dressed (.8 - .4 | Duration: 0.6 sec) Action: The same Character. She spins back to face the camera. Wardrobe change: She is now instantly dressed in professional office wear (e.g., a crisp white button-down shirt and a navy blue blazer). She is adjusting her collar or cuffs. Transition: Immediate continuous spin away. Scene 6: Morning Coffee (.4 - .0 | Duration: 0.6 sec) Action: The same Character. She spins back to face the camera. She is holding a sleek travel coffee mug and takes a quick, sharp sip. Transition: Immediate continuous spin away. Scene 7: The Catch & Finale (.0 - .0 | Duration: 1.0 sec) Action: The same Character. She completes the final spin facing the camera. She is now wearing stylish glasses. Looking slightly off-camera, she confidently catches a professional tote bag or briefcase that is thrown to her from behind the camera. She looks straight into the lens, completely ready for the day. The video ends here.

prompts.display_text: I'm leaving you the prompt I used so you can copy it as a base and ask any AI to adapt it to your vehicle and environment ---- Title / Concept “CIVIC TYPE R — DOMINION IN EVERY CURVE” — a 15s high-performance commercial where the car conquers a dramatic mountain road, blending precision engineering with raw driving emotion. STYLE / VISUAL AESTHETIC Cinematic automotive realism, mountain lighting like [attached road image] , high contrast tones, glossy red paint reflecting landscape, motion blur, dynamic environment, premium commercial finish. SUBJECTS Red Honda Civic Type R — aggressive stance, black aerodynamic details, rear wing, triple exhaust, sharp LED headlights, performance wheels gripping asphalt. ENVIRONMENT Winding mountain road with guardrails, dense pine forests, towering rocky peaks in the background, golden sunlight cutting through clouds, sense of altitude and open space. MOOD / INTENT Adrenaline, control, freedom, precision under pressure. The car feels planted, alive, engineered for curves and speed. CAMERA / CINEMATOGRAPHY Dynamic tracking shots, low-angle chase cams, drone sweeps, wheel-level motion shots, fast push-ins, lateral tracking with background blur, crisp subject isolation, cinematic motion blur at speed. TIMELINE 0.0s–2.0s Wide aerial shot of a winding mountain road at golden hour. The red Civic appears in the distance, cutting through curves. Text: “CONTROL STARTS HERE”. 2.0s–4.0s Low front tracking shot. The car charges forward, headlights sharp. Road lines streak beneath. Mountains reflect across the hood. 4.0s–6.0s Side chase shot. The Civic takes a tight curve with precision. Wheels grip aggressively, slight body roll controlled. Background blurs into speed. 6.0s–8.5s Rear three-quarter shot. The spoiler slices the air. Triple exhaust centered. Subtle heat distortion. Text: “BUILT FOR THE CURVES”. 8.5s–11.0s Rapid montage: close-up wheel spinning, brake calipers clamping, steering input, suspension compression over asphalt. Each cut synced to deep bass hits. 11.0s–13.0s Drone orbit as the car exits a curve into a straight. Sunlight hits the red paint dramatically. The car accelerates into open road. 13.0s–15.0s Front hero shot as the car approaches camera and slows slightly. Final text: “HONDA CIVIC TYPE R”. Subline: “IT DOESN’T FOLLOW THE ROAD. IT DOMINATES IT.” End on engine echo fading into the mountains. GLOBAL KEYWORDS automotive commercial, mountain road, Honda Civic Type R, dynamic driving, cinematic car ad, performance, curves, speed, control, golden hour

CAMERA / CINEMATOGRAPHY Dynamic tracking shots, low-angle chase cams, drone sweeps, wheel-level motion shots, fast push-ins, lateral tracking with background blur, crisp subject isolation, cinematic motion blur at speed. TIMELINE 0.0s–2.0s Wide aerial shot of a winding mountain road at golden hour. The red Civic appears in the distance, cutting through curves. Text: “CONTROL STARTS HERE”. 2.0s–4.0s Low front tracking shot. The car charges forward, headlights sharp. Road lines streak beneath. Mountains reflect across the hood. 4.0s–6.0s Side chase shot. The Civic takes a tight curve with precision. Wheels grip aggressively, slight body roll controlled. Background blurs into speed. 6.0s–8.5s Rear three-quarter shot. The spoiler slices the air. Triple exhaust centered. Subtle heat distortion. Text: “BUILT FOR THE CURVES”. 8.5s–11.0s Rapid montage: close-up wheel spinning, brake calipers clamping, steering input, suspension compression over asphalt. Each cut synced to deep bass hits. 11.0s–13.0s Drone orbit as the car exits a curve into a straight. Sunlight hits the red paint dramatically. The car accelerates into open road. 13.0s–15.0s Front hero shot as the car approaches camera and slows slightly. Final text: “HONDA CIVIC TYPE R”. Subline: “IT DOESN’T FOLLOW THE ROAD. IT DOMINATES IT.” End on engine echo fading into the mountains. GLOBAL KEYWORDS automotive commercial, mountain road, Honda Civic Type R, dynamic driving, cinematic car ad, performance, curves, speed, control, golden hour

prompts.display_text: A 42-year-old Tibetan monk with shaved head and deep-set eyes, wearing layered charcoal robes threaded with faint gravitational lattice patterns, skin marked with subtle fractal scars that pulse with dim violet light — opening frame is a medium close-up of him seated in lotus position on a levitating stone disk above a vast canyon, fragments of rock orbiting slowly around him in silent suspension under a starless sky. His right hand rotates slowly and the surrounding debris begins accelerating, forming a visible gravity well — at second two the ground below implodes inward as the canyon floor collapses into a spiraling sinkhole, triggering a rapid dolly zoom outward revealing entire mountain ridges bending toward his position. He never stands: the right hand amplifies gravitational pull, pulling structures inward; the left hand inverts local gravity fields, sending boulders and enemies upward into suspended orbit. Dynamic orbit camera circles him as debris fields form layered rings around his body, snap zooming into his hands during each gravity surge, snap cutting to collapsing terrain as impact confirmation. Deep violet fills the core frame, while black void distortion consumes the outer edges — lensing effects bending light around him. Escalation builds through increasing mass displacement until a floating fortress is pulled from the horizon and crushed inward. Final beat: hard POV shift — camera becomes the collapsing gravity field itself, spiraling downward through airborne debris into the canyon core as everything converges into a singular point. Gravitational lensing distorts all edges of frame; dust and stone fragments stretch under compression; subtle starfield flicker appears in void zones. Epic cosmic realism, ultra-detailed debris physics, volumetric dust collapse, 4K ultra-detail.

prompts.display_text: 0-3s · Otherworldly Inscription Low-angle upward shot. The void entity's right hand embeds into the altar, dark veins in fractal geometry patterns wildly parasitizing across the stone slab. Fissures erupt with viscous flesh tendrils, the ground pulsating dramatically like lungs. Background sect ancient architecture undergoes visual horizontal displacement tremors. 3-6s · Ossified Mutation Circling ascending/descending shot. The entity's spine explodes and twists in a chain reaction, obsidian horn crown piercing out from deep within the skull. Both arms entwined with liquid black smoke, generating high-temperature electric arcs in the air along its path, suspended lanterns instantly bursting in a visually collapsing overload. 6-9s · Material Deconstruction Pull-back shot. The entity's epidermis displays porcelain-like cracking textures, revealing a writhing dark matter core inside. Fingertips mutate into half-meter-long shadow blades, instantly triggering accelerated decay upon touching wooden pillars, the architectural structure dissolving into rising black smoke. 9-12s · Shadow Tide Devouring High-altitude overhead shot. The entity raises its arm, darkness behind it collapsing then erupting violently, forming a kilometer-scale black-red corrupted tsunami. The shadow flood ravages everything in its path—bluestone pavement, stone lions, pavilions—all pixelated, torn apart, and devoured. 12-15s · Void Finale Facial close-up. In the background, the massive mountain gate twists and snaps like a hemp rope under black hole gravity toward the center. The entity approaches slowly in dead silence, its pupils containing a rotating void nebula. It stares into the lens, the frame generating intense film burning and signal glitch effects, ultimately fading into absolute darkness.

prompts.display_text: Playful high-stakes slapstick cinematic scene in an abandoned wooden warehouse with warm amber sunlight and cool industrial shadows. A mischievous ginger tabby cat wearing a tiny tactical harness performs a secret “spy mission” while suspended from a rope, holding a lit firecracker. Below him, a plump white chicken wearing a blue nightcap sleeps on grain sacks, snoring loudly. The cat theatrically drops the firecracker into the chicken’s nightcap. It explodes in a burst of purple smoke and flying feathers. The chicken is launched upward in exaggerated cartoon physics, then lands dazed, slowly turning toward camera with glowing red eyes in a dramatic cliffhanger. prompts.display_text: Scene 1: A cracked empty street near a foggy shoreline. A woman in a long grey coat walks slowly toward the camera. Beside her floats a giant fragmented human face made of broken buildings and concrete, subtly shifting as if alive. Dust particles drift in the air. Scene 2: Cut to a tired child leaning against a broken wall indoors, eyes half-closed, exhausted. In the blurred background, another child sits silently. The atmosphere feels heavy, abandoned, and hopeless. Scene 3: A stern middle-aged man in a grey overcoat stands in a ruined European-style street beside an old rusty car. The camera slowly pushes in as he looks ahead with a hardened expression. Scene 4: Close-up of a woman’s face partially merged with mechanical and architectural fragments. Orange butterflies flutter around her head in slow motion, symbolizing fragile hope. Scene 5: A crowded street under a massive curved wall embedded with small structures and windows. People walk aimlessly, heads down, creating a sense of routine and oppression. Scene 6: A street musician with messy hair plays a guitar into a vintage microphone. Behind him stands a silent crowd. A rusted tram looms in the background. Light rain begins to fall. Scene 7: A line of children in worn vintage clothing stands still, staring directly into the camera. Their expressions are blank, almost haunting. Slow dolly movement forward. Scene 8: A surreal couple walks together. The woman carries a house-like structure on her head, with her face visible through a small window. The man beside her is partially covered in dark soot. They walk through rubble in silence. Scene 9 (Final): A woman sits in a cluttered room filled with old radios and clocks. A sign reading “MORE” hangs behind her. She slowly turns a knob on a vintage radio as static fills the air. Fade to black. Style & Motion Keywords cinematic, dystopian, surreal realism, slow motion, dramatic lighting, volumetric fog, depth of field, 35mm film look, desaturated tones, symbolic storytelling, melancholic mood, smooth camera movement

prompts.display_text: A cinematic concert gacha reveal in portrait orientation. Phase 1 (2s): Dark arena with scattered blue-white penlight dots. Vertical Japanese text of the character's catchphrase reveals rapidly character-by-character with soft glow. Camera orbits above the audience. Phase 2 (2.5s): Camera swings toward the stage. 8-10 vertical spotlight beams descend from trusses. Steady zoom in reveals spherical footlights along the stage edge. A rainbow-colored ring burst explodes at center with multicolored star-shaped particles scattering outward. Phase 3 (3.5s): Stage reappears with an elaborate gothic arch structure. Penlights multiply into a vibrant rainbow sea below. On the large screen behind the stage, a character silhouette slowly materializes. Camera creeps closer. The glow intensifies into a massive four-pointed star flash, then instant cut to total black. Phase 4 (3s): A blinding white flash erupts. The stage returns dramatically upgraded — golden fireworks shoot upward from both sides of the arch, backdrop transforms into stained-glass geometric patterns in pink, purple, blue and gold. The character materializes from silhouette to full color on center stage. Crossing laser beams sweep from the sides. Phase 5 (4s): Screen floods white, resolves into a close-up dolly sweeping right-to-left past colorful spotlights with dense rainbow penlights waving below. Camera pulls back to center revealing the full arena — arch stage, stained glass screen, character center, thousands of rainbow penlights. Final frame: character illustration in a decorative frame.

prompts.display_text: 15-second cinematic video, ultra-smooth camera, natural focus pulls, warm-to-cool color shift, photorealistic 8K, ARRI Alexa look. Macro close-up of a Michelin-style salmon rose—glossy, orange-pink layers. Knife makes a slow precise slice, oils shimmer (0–3s). Focus pulls to a calm young man in side profile as he lifts a bite (3–5s). Extreme close-up bite—slow chew, eyes soften, subtle smile (5–7s). Fast push into his eye—reflection blooms into light, scene dissolves (7–8s). Underwater world: wide shot, sun rays through turquoise water, corals, seaweed, schools of salmon swimming. Man floats weightlessly, watching fish in calm wonder. Slow orbit, light beams shifting (8–13s). Match cut back to restaurant—same angle, he swallows, smiles, continues eating (13–15s). SFX: knife slice, soft chew, restaurant ambiance fading into underwater sounds and back. No text overlays.

prompts.display_text: FORMAT: 15s / 150 BPM / 8 shots / compact action duel loop SUBJECTS: One occult fighter and one curse-like creature, both drawn as 2.5D line-art characters with visible contour lines, interior sketch lines and light hatching, never solid black fill, one body each in every beat. SCENE: Black and white 3D sketch-anime combat inside a minimal sketch ruin on white paper. Keep clear 2.5D line-art characters with contour lines, interior construction strokes and light hatching, not black silhouette bodies. Start on direct impact, not entry, with both characters already in mid-exchange at center frame. Use aggressive cinematic framing, hard impact punctuation, sharp micro-pauses, strong anticipation and forceful follow-through while preserving left-right continuity and readable strike lanes. The creature uses short curse bursts, limb warping and ink shockwaves. Build the action as a seamless loop so the final rush reconnects directly into the opening clash. The space has floor, broken wall planes and depth, and only redraws on hits, surges or skids. MOOD: Occult pressure, supernatural force, hard cinematic impact, seamless loop energy. COLOR LOGIC: Monochromatic Grading STYLE: 3D hand-drawn sketch anime with 2.5D line-art characters, bold cinematic action framing and readable curse-battle choreography TIMELINE: 1. Smash cut, low 24mm impact track, open on direct mid-clash at center frame as fighter's short strike and creature's forearm collide, lines splinter outward, both bodies compress then snap past each other without stopping, SFX: impact snap, brush tear. 2. Hard cut, 35mm handheld push, fighter pivots out of the pass, shoulder-feints and lands a short body strike under guard, both recoil half a step with visible force transfer, SFX: air slice, ink thud. 3. Whip pan, 50mm side track, creature whips a warped forearm across a clear lane and sheds a short ink shockwave, fighter slips under both by inches, SFX: heavy whoosh, brush tear, ink flare. 4. Smash cut, 28mm close pursuit, micro-pause, fighter plants, twists through the hips and drives a compact rib counter, impact distortion spikes and the camera kicks with contact, SFX: crack hit, ink burst. 5. Match cut, 40mm rear three-quarter, creature skids backward as floor and wall lines redraw under the impact path, SFX: scrape, paper rip, low ink pulse. 6. Hard cut, 32mm handheld orbit, creature slams back in with one arm warping longer, fighter gives ground, parries high and pivots across the axis to keep continuity, SFX: double hit, sharp breath, tendon stretch. 7. Whip pan, 65mm impact close-up, fighter coils low, holds one sharp micro-pause, then releases a decisive upward strike, recoil whips through both bodies and the frame blows out white for a beat, SFX: deep crack, white flash burst. 8. Hard cut, 24mm wide pursuit frame, creature regathers, fires a short chest-level curse burst and surges back to center as fighter rebounds into the same opposing rush geometry as beat 1, SFX: trailing crack, paper hiss, ink burst, rushing foot drag.

prompts.display_text: Overarching Concept: Continuous character journey, moving from gritty Y2K streetwear on a dark rooftop to a stylized, high-tech "tech-ninja" aesthetic inside a pristine white iOS interface dimension. Fast-paced, fluid, and highly interactive with the camera. Universal Rule: The same red-haired woman from Scene 1 must appear in all subsequent scenes, ensuring perfect visual continuity. Scene 1 (00:00–00:01): Rooftop Throw Location: Windy urban rooftop at night, glowing city skyline. Wardrobe (Character 1): Y2K style — baggy vintage denim jacket, graphic baby tee, wide-leg parachute pants. Character Continuity: A specific red-haired woman with wavy copper hair. Action & Camera: Static camera. The red-haired woman spins rapidly, her loose clothes catching the wind. Mid-spin, she throws an iPhone 17 Pro Max directly into the camera lens. Scene 2 (00:01–00:02): Giant Phone Spin Location: Blurred night city backdrop. Action & Camera: Focus pulls to the giant, spinning iPhone 17 Pro Max in the foreground. It stops spinning, hovering vertically and centered. Scene 3 (00:02–00:07): The "Twist & Pull" Transition (CRITICAL FOCUS — NO GLASS BREAKING) Location: Still on the night rooftop, phone centered. Character Continuity: The same red-haired woman (from Scene 1) is visible inside the glowing white phone screen, smiling confidently. Wardrobe (Character 2): A tight, form-fitting, cropped matte-black leather motorcycle jacket over a white top. Action (The Twist): Her hand smoothly emerges from the screen into 3D space (the screen acts like a fluid boundary — no glass breaking). She reaches toward the camera and performs a twisting motion with her wrist and fingers — exactly like screwing in a lightbulb or turning a dial. Camera (Max Zoom): As she twists, the camera zooms in maximally on her hand. Action (The Pull): She reverses the twisting motion and rapidly retracts her hand back into the phone. Camera (The Dive): This reverse motion acts as a physical "pull." As she yanks her hand back, she pulls the camera with her — the camera flies rapidly into the phone screen, fully entering the digital interface. Scene 4 (00:07–00:14): UI Dimension & The Final Punchline Location: Bright, infinite white 3D space. Character Continuity: The same red-haired woman stands center, smiling confidently. Wardrobe (Character 3 — "Tech-Ninja"): Full matte-black tactical jumpsuit in technical fabric; asymmetrical layered vest with utility straps; multi-strap chest harness with glowing magnetic buckles; full gloves with integrated digital displays; chunky combat platform boots. Interface Elements: Gigantic simplified floating 3D app icons — Instagram camera, TikTok "d", Snapchat ghost — swirling around her. The Finale: She looks directly at the camera, playfully catches a glowing "Like" (Heart) icon from the air, gives a sharp wink, and throws the icon straight into the camera lens. The icon covers the lens, turning the screen instantly to black — creating a definitive ending or a seamless loop back to the start.

prompts.display_text: FORMAT: 15s / 182 BPM / 7 CUTS / minimalist 2D stick-fight animation, pure white background, ultra-fast readability SUBJECTS: Two 2D stick fighters drawn in solid black lines on a blank white field. One is lean, evasive, and elastic. The other is wider, heavier, and constantly presses forward with crushing force. ENVIRONMENT: Empty white void, no props. Only black speed lines, impact rings, smear frames, skid marks, and sharp red blood accents. Clean negative space keeps every move instantly readable. MOOD: Brutal, explosive, relentless, stylish, unfinished. COLOR LOGIC: Monochromatic Grading TIMELINE: 0:00-0:01 - Wide shot, extreme negative space. The lean fighter stands centered and still. The heavy fighter drops from above already throwing a downward strike. Sudden hard push-in. 24mm wide feel. SFX: air drop, hard land, cutting whoosh. 0:01-0:03 - CUT ON ACTION. Side wide shot. Heavy fighter unleashes jab, hook, knee. Lean fighter slips, guards, absorbs the knee, then fires back with calf kick, straight punch, spinning back kick.
