prompts.display_text: **Environment:** A frozen glacial valley under pale arctic twilight. Deep cobalt shadows across the ice field with cold blue ambient light reflecting from massive glacier walls. Snow particles drifting through the air. Frozen lake surfaces acting as natural mirrors for diegetic reflections. **Action:** 15.0s sequence. A towering figure composed of crystalline ice and refracting light engages a magma-armored titan whose body glows through volcanic fissures beneath black stone plating. They clash in rapid close-range combat across the frozen lake. Each strike fractures the ice beneath them, sending radial cracks spreading outward. The magma titan’s punches melt sections of the glacier while the ice giant counters with explosive frost bursts that instantly freeze the molten rock. Velocity Ramp choreography: rapid exchanges freeze into ultra-slow motion when fists collide, showing ice crystals shattering and lava droplets vaporizing before snapping back to full speed as both titans slide across the ice surface. **Camera:** Low tracking shot sliding across the frozen lake surface, reflections capturing both combatants. A sudden upward crane move follows the moment the magma titan is thrown into a glacier wall, ice exploding outward. **Style & Constraints:** 8K resolution, photorealistic volumetric snow, ray-traced reflections on ice surfaces, cinematic cold lighting, 35mm film grain, stable geometry, no flicker.

prompts.display_text: [Style] Y2K Retro Pool Party, MiniDV Camcorder Texture (Camcorder Footage), Overexposed Warm Yellow, Film Grain, VHS Interference Lines, Fast-Paced Beat-Synced [Duration] 15 seconds [Scene] 2000s American Backyard Pool Party, Blazing Sun, Dazzling Water Ripples, Folding Lounge Chairs, Silver CD Player, Rainbow Inflatable Floats, Plastic Whale [Characters] A group of Y2K-styled girls: Low-Rise Bikinis, Belly Chains, Colorful Plastic Sunglasses, Butterfly Clips, Glitter Lip Gloss [00:00-00:01.5] Shot 1: Bursting Out of Water (Close-up / Pullback) DV Boot-Up Blue Screen Flashes with REC Red Dot. In-Your-Face Close-Up—A girl wearing colorful plastic sunglasses erupts from underwater, flinging wet hair to spray an arc of water (Slow-mo), water droplets splashing the lens, grinning wide at the DV as sunlight overexposes to pure white. [00:01.5-00:03] Shot 2: Poolside Stroll (Low Angle / Right Pan) Low-angle waist-high right pan, three girls in sheer cover-ups clutching canned drinks saunter across wet tiles, one snapping a selfie with a flip phone, chunky platform flip-flops slapping the ground. [00:03-00:04.5] Shot 3: Shoving into the Pool (Dutch Angle) Dutch angle medium shot, one girl shoves her bestie into the pool from behind, soda can flying out, body splashing in with a massive spray, the pusher doubled over laughing. [00:04.5-00:06] Shot 4: FPV Dive (FPV Drone Dive) FPV dives from above skimming the water surface, girls lounging on floats soaking up the sun, one raising a disposable film camera (Disposable Camera) to flash the lens. [00:06-00:07] Shot 5: Ice in Glass (Macro / Still) Macro still frame, ice cubes drop into a plastic cup, orange liquid splashing up, the hand gripping it adorned with colorful rubber bracelets, sunlight piercing the liquid to cast caustic light spots. [00:07-00:08.5] Shot 6: Dance Tracking (Tracking / Backward Follow) Backward tracking locked on her face, a girl with wet hair clinging to her cheeks and butterfly clips in her hair sways in a woven bikini amid the crowd, hoop earrings swinging, smiling straight into the lens. [00:08.5-00:10] Shot 7: Diving Silhouette (Worm's Eye / Push-in) Worm's-eye upward push, girl launches off the diving board into a silhouette, sun exploding into lens flare, water droplets turning to sparkles in the air. [00:10-00:11.5] Shot 8: Clinking Glasses (Close-up / Left Pan) Quick left pan, two girls clink red plastic cups, liquid spilling out in golden arcs, eyes squinting with laughter. [00:11.5-00:13] Shot 9: DJ Over-the-Shoulder (OTS / Pull-in) Over-the-shoulder push-in on the DJ, foreground fingers hit buttons on the silver CD player, background girls go wild splashing water to the beat, backlit sprays forming a golden rain curtain. [00:13-00:15] Shot 10: Golden Hour Wide Freeze (Extreme Wide / Crane Rise) Crane shot rapidly pulls up, the entire pool party unfurling in golden hour warm light, packed with people and inflatable toys, water surface shattered into gold. Overlay DV timestamp "08/15/2000 PM 5:47," freeze-frame flickering to mimic VHS pause.

prompts.display_text: SHOT: camera_motion: tracking shot movement_dynamics: The camera stays anchored on the central silhouetted swordsman, executing fast micro-pans and sudden whip-pans to frame each incoming enemy from the darkness. The camera shakes violently on each high-impact flash to emphasize the kinetic energy and aggressive strobing rhythm of the scene. ACTIONS: core_action: A heavily silhouetted man in a deep red cinematic void stands in a martial arts combat stance holding a katana. A sequence of massive, monstrous silhouetted enemies rushes him sequentially from the shadows: a hulking bipedal reptile, a giant mutated arachnid, a shadowy wraith with elongated claws, a towering armored brute wielding a heavy mace, and a ferocious winged gargoyle. The swordsman executes blazing, precise katana strikes with authentic momentum conservation. Exactly upon blade contact with each target, a powerful 1-frame white light flash explodes, momentarily overexposing the entire scene and freezing the exact point of impact. Between the strobing flashes, the environment instantly plunges back into deep red darkness, while the defeated monsters immediately dissolve into black smoke or drop out of frame. The sequence maintains a relentless, high-contrast, hyper-kinetic rhythm of shadows, precise physical strikes, and sudden blinding light.

prompts.display_text: Generate a visual blockbuster featuring a top-tier commercial aesthetic with an Asian supermodel and luxury sports cars, requiring director-level storyboard choreography, with a tight and sophisticated rhythm. 0-2 seconds: [Macro to Micro] The opening uses a high-speed push shot, transitioning in an instant from the sharp headlights of the sports car with trailing afterimages to a close-up of the Asian top model's pupils, showcasing the ultimate essence of Eastern allure. 2-5 seconds: [LOCKED-ON SHOT] The camera locks on the model's side profile, following her confident and elegant strides with a lateral tracking shot. The model wears a haute couture silk-textured evening gown, her hair strands gently swaying in the wind, with a blurred neon city elevated bridge in the background. 5-8 seconds: [360-Degree Orbiting Track Shot] The model stands at the central intersection of three sports cars, with the camera orbiting rapidly around her from a low angle. Through overcranking (slow motion) processing, capture her icy and alluring glance back, her gaze exuding strong aggression and sophistication. 8-10 seconds: [Low-Angle Hero Shot from Below] The camera pulls back rapidly from ground level to a full wide shot, with the model standing proudly in the center of the luxury car cluster. The frame composition presents perfect symmetrical aesthetics, with light and shadow focused on her face, showcasing a queen-like dominance. Visual Style: Ultimate cinematic realism, 2.35:1 widescreen. Overall color grading leans toward cool teal and orange (Teal & Orange), with natural film grain texture and softened highlights. The character's skin texture is delicately natural, featuring top-luxury magazine-level makeup and styling. Sound Design: Deep bass electronic ambient music, with sound effects synced precisely to shot transitions (Swish effects), and the visual rhythm breathing in sync with the music's drum beats. Control Instructions: Lock in the Asian model's facial features and sophisticated makeup for consistency across varying shots; ensure seamless, fluid action transitions without stuttering, with lighting and shadows producing real-time physical reflections based on the model's movements.

prompts.display_text: Want to know how to achieve this insane level of cinematic detail and fluid dynamics using Seedance 2.0? Here is the exact prompt I used! Subject: > A large, shaggy-haired dog and a real white duck, both completely free of leashes or harnesses. Both animals are soaking wet, with water visibly dripping from the dog's heavy coat and beading off the duck's waxy feathers. Action: > The dog and duck enter the house together. In the center of the room, they both stop for a synchronized grooming moment. In extreme slow motion, the dog starts a powerful head-to-tail shake, creating a massive, spiraling spray of water droplets. Simultaneously, the duck stands tall, stretches its neck, and vigorously flaps its wings to shake off the rain, sending smaller, fine droplets into the air. The two overlapping sprays of water create a beautiful, chaotic pattern of liquid physics as they catch the light. Camera & Movement: > Fixed low-angle cinematic shot. The camera is placed at floor level to emphasize the scale of the animals and the trajectory of the water droplets. High-speed camera aesthetic (slow motion) to capture every ripple in the dog's skin and every individual feather movement of the duck. Environment: > Entrance of a cozy, modern home with a polished dark wood floor. In the background, through the open door, a soft-focus view of a grey, rainy garden. The floor acts as a dark mirror, showing sharp, glistening reflections of the dog, the duck, and the flying water. Style & Lighting: > Hyper-realistic documentary style. Natural, soft light from the overcast exterior creates a "cool" rim light on the animals' silhouettes, while warm interior lamps provide a soft "fill" light. High-fidelity liquid simulation for the droplets, with realistic motion blur only on the fastest moving water particles. Technical Metadata: > 15s duration, synchronized dual-subject motion, advanced liquid particles, 4K resolution.

prompts.display_text: EL TAQUERORON SEEDANCE 2.0 — TEXT TO VIDEO — 15 SECONDS — 21:9 ASPECT SHOT 00:00–00:02 · LA TAQUERÍA Extreme close-up macro — the trompo al pastor turning in the early morning light. The meat glistening, the charcoal glow behind it, the pineapple on top catching the fire light. Camera pulls back slowly: Chuy's taquería in Tepito, 6am. Chuy behind the counter — white apron, red bandana on forehead, arms crossed. The trompo turning. The comal hot. The cilantro and onion chopped and waiting. A line of workers, construction helmets and lunchboxes, waiting for their tacos. The trompo spins. Faster than it should. SHOT 00:02–00:04.5 · LA SEÑAL The last customer in line receives his taco. Chuy looks at the trompo — now empty of customers but still turning. He touches the trompo's base with one hand. It vibrates. The pineapple on top begins glowing — not orange from the fire, but supernatural gold. The charcoal fire intensifies: the coals glowing white-hot. The cilantro and onion on the cutting board lift off and orbit the trompo slowly. The salsa jars rattle. The hot sauce begins glowing red. SHOT 00:04.5–00:08 · LA TRANSFORMACIÓN Speed 40%. The trompo IS the transformation's axis — everything builds around its rotation. The vertical spit becomes the robot's spine. The stacked meat panels unfold outward from the spit like a flower — each layer of al pastor becoming one armor plate, the seasoning visible in the texture of each panel, the achiote red and the pineapple gold. The charcoal grill base spreads outward, becoming the robot's legs — the grill grates forming foot soles that leave scorch marks on the street. The comal rises and becomes a shield in the robot's right arm. The enormous carving knife that Chuy uses to slice the taco meat — it rises and becomes the robot's sword, still glowing from the fire. The pineapple on top of the trompo becomes the robot's head — glowing gold, with charcoal-fire eyes. Chuy in the head pod: visible inside the pineapple, red bandana still on, white apron. The hot sauce bottles orbit the robot's shoulders. Sparks fly in achiote red and charcoal orange. SHOT 00:08–00:11 · EL TAQUERO ROBOT The Chuy Robot stands on the Tepito street — built from fire and meat and the smell

prompts.display_text: Slow-motion portrait of a sprinter in starting blocks on a track under bright stadium lights. Night setting, deep shadows and sharp highlights. Opening frame: complete stillness — fingers pressed against the track, tension visible. Close-up: muscles trembling slightly. At the 2-second mark the start signal hits. Velocity ramp: explosive launch — feet pushing off blocks, track particles scattering. The camera tracks alongside the runner. Muscle fibers contract visibly, sweat beads flying backward. Fabric ripples under speed. Final beat: runner accelerating into darkness, lights streaking behind. Hyper-real motion physics, track texture, cinematic contrast lighting, 4K.

prompts.tweet_text:
The prompt does the heavy lifting. Mine had three sections:

1. Scene setup (chef, kitchen, lighting)
2. Action beats (crack egg, oil snaps, close-up of yolk)
3. Audio cues (sizzle, soft jazz, dialogue "service up")

Seedance reads action beats as cuts. That is how you get multi-shot in one pass.

prompts.display_text: The scene lives in breath, silence, and proximity. Set the entire moment in a dim vintage apartment hallway, or the corner of an old room that feels half-forgotten. Deep walnut wood paneling. Antique brass wall sconces. One warm amber pool of light falls over the women while everything beyond it dies into shadow. The space should feel beautiful, expensive, and airless, as if the room itself is closing around them. Character one is Han Seo-rin, early 30s, a Korean female idol with an elegant but quietly dangerous presence. She wears a black turtleneck under a long black coat, all clean lines and dark restraint. Her hair is sleek, dark, and softly layered around the face, with a slight fringe that lets her eyes appear and disappear in the low light. She is not loud. She is the kind of woman who controls a room by lowering her voice. Character two is Tachibana Rei, 25, a Japanese female idol with a pale, fragile beauty that reads delicate at first glance but emotionally intelligent on closer look. She wears an ivory V-neck knit dress that falls to the knees, soft and understated, the fabric catching the warm light. Her long dark hair is slightly disordered, as though the evening has already worn her down. She looks like someone trying very hard not to show fear. The emotional shape is simple: suspicion, pressure, fixation. No overt violence. No grabbing. No melodrama. The tension comes from how little space Seo-rin leaves Rei to breathe. Open on Rei already standing near the wall beneath the sconce, shoulders tight, breathing shallow, gaze lowered but restless. Then let Seo-rin enter behind her, close enough to dominate the frame without touching. She stops just at Rei’s back, almost still, letting the silence do the work. The camera should feel like it is slowly being pulled toward them. Seo-rin leans in toward Rei’s ear, speaking so softly that it feels more dangerous than a shout. One hand rises near Rei’s cheek, almost brushing it, but never quite landing. Keep that hesitation. That is where the charge is. Rei’s hands tense near her chest. Her fingers curl. Her jaw tightens. She looks away, then toward the doorway, then down again, realizing there is nowhere easy to go. Use close shots of the details that matter: the tremor in Rei’s fingers, the flicker in her eyes, the shadow of Seo-rin’s face falling across her neck, the black silhouette of the coat swallowing the warm light, the tiny pause before a breath, the way Rei tries to stay composed and fails by a fraction. Dialogue should feel intimate, dangerous, and controlled. Seo-rin, near Rei’s ear, almost gentle: “You can run from everyone else. Not from me.” Seo-rin, after the smallest pause: “Stay where I can see you.” Rei, voice unsteady, trying to hold herself together: “Please... just let me leave.” Seo-rin, with the faintest smile, certain of the answer before she speaks: “You already know this is where the story ends.” Performance note: Seo-rin is never frantic, never theatrical, never raising her voice. Her control is what makes her frightening. Rei is not weak, just cornered; she should feel intelligent, proud, and increasingly shaken, fighting to keep her dignity in a moment that is slipping out of her hands. Visual tone: premium psychological thriller, shallow depth of field, slow deliberate camera drift, warm practical light against surrounding darkness, realistic skin texture, subtle fabric movement, no camp, no exaggerated acting. The scene should feel like a forbidden, dangerous beat from an expensive late-night TV drama.

prompts.display_text: DAY STRUCTURE: 15s / 148 BPM / ONE CONTINUOUS SHOT / 3D slapstick wuxia-animal comedy TONE: disciplined temple routine collapsing into chaotic micro-mayhem SUBJECT: Orange cat monk in worn grey dao robe, agile but constantly sleep-deprived CAST: Black-robed chanting cat monks (low-energy), White training monks (overconfident), Elder red-robed master cat (silent authority) PROPS: Rope bucket well, wooden bucket, prayer beads, bamboo axe, stone courtyard, rooftop tiles, incense smoke ENVIRONMENT: Mountain temple complex—courtyard → prayer hall → well → training square → rooftops → bamboo forest → dorm room COLOR: Dawn gold → harsh noon white → sunset amber CAMERA: Single uninterrupted 24mm Steadicam, fast whip transitions, gravity-defying follow, no cuts 1 (0–2s) DAWN WAKE Camera glides through temple roof gap into dorm. Orange cat monk jolts awake to loud birds. He freezes... then performs an exaggerated full-body stretch that briefly distorts his silhouette before snapping back. 2 (2–4s) PRAYER HALL ENTRY He rushes straight into black-robed chanting monks. They recite in dull unison. He tries to chant—mouth moving too slow—head dips mid-syllable, almost asleep while standing. 3 (4–5.5s) WELL SNAP ACTION Hard whip pan to courtyard well. He yanks rope instantly—bucket rockets up, water splashes camera. He wipes face aggressively, fully rebooted. 4 (5.5–7.5s) TRAINING SQUARE MISFIRE Camera swings into white-robed training monks. They strike in formation. He joins late, misreads rhythm, and accidentally redirects every punch—monks scatter outward in synchronized slow-motion confusion. 5 (7.5–8.5s) ELDER INTERRUPTION Elder red-robed master appears frame edge. Instant freeze. Orange monk bows too fast, overshoots balance, slides sideways in panic respect. 6 (8.5–10s) ROOFTOP LAUNCH He bolts upward. Camera tilts and follows as he runs wall-to-roof seamlessly, robe flaring. Tiles crack under rapid steps. 7 (10–11.5s) BAMBOO FOREST AXE BURST Whip transition lands him in forest. He grabs axe mid-motion and chops wood at insane speed—each swing splitting logs and launching chips like ricocheting projectiles. 8 (11.5–13s) SUNSET FATIGUE RUN Lighting shifts to amber. Same continuous camera tracks him looping tasks—run, chop, stumble recover. Motion stays fast but posture collapses slightly each step. 9 (13–14.5s) RETURN PASS He walks back through temple gate. Other monks salute. He tries to respond properly but only manages delayed, tired nods while still moving. 10 (14.5–15s) BED DROP END Camera follows into dorm. He collapses instantly onto mat. Eyes close mid-fall. Final frame holds on stillness as wind chime rings once. SFX: playful shakuhachi + brisk percussion engine, comedic taiko “bonk” hits on monk impacts, rope snap + water splash burst at well, fast wooden clack for training chaos, bamboo crack percussion in forest, ending with soft koto + single wind chime decay into silence.

prompts.tweet_text:
cat master deserves a nice break 
(made with Seedance 2.0 on 
@nemovideoai
 )
Prompt share 

DAY STRUCTURE: 15s / 148 BPM / ONE CONTINUOUS SHOT / 3D slapstick wuxia-animal comedy

TONE: disciplined temple routine collapsing into chaotic micro-mayhem
SUBJECT: Orange cat monk in worn grey dao robe, agile but constantly sleep-deprived
CAST: Black-robed chanting cat monks (low-energy), White training monks (overconfident), Elder red-robed master cat (silent authority)
PROPS: Rope bucket well, wooden bucket, prayer beads, bamboo axe, stone courtyard, rooftop tiles, incense smoke
ENVIRONMENT: Mountain temple complex—courtyard → prayer hall → well → training square → rooftops → bamboo forest → dorm room
COLOR: Dawn gold → harsh noon white → sunset amber
CAMERA: Single uninterrupted 24mm Steadicam, fast whip transitions, gravity-defying follow, no cuts

1 (0–2s) DAWN WAKE
Camera glides through temple roof gap into dorm. Orange cat monk jolts awake to loud birds. He freezes… then performs an exaggerated full-body stretch that briefly distorts his silhouette before snapping back.

2 (2–4s) PRAYER HALL ENTRY
He rushes straight into black-robed chanting monks. They recite in dull unison. He tries to chant—mouth moving too slow—head dips mid-syllable, almost asleep while standing.

3 (4–5.5s) WELL SNAP ACTION
Hard whip pan to courtyard well. He yanks rope instantly—bucket rockets up, water splashes camera. He wipes face aggressively, fully rebooted.

4 (5.5–7.5s) TRAINING SQUARE MISFIRE
Camera swings into white-robed training monks. They strike in formation. He joins late, misreads rhythm, and accidentally redirects every punch—monks scatter outward in synchronized slow-motion confusion.

5 (7.5–8.5s) ELDER INTERRUPTION
Elder red-robed master appears frame edge. Instant freeze. Orange monk bows too fast, overshoots balance, slides sideways in panic respect.

6 (8.5–10s) ROOFTOP LAUNCH
He bolts upward. Camera tilts and follows as he runs wall-to-roof seamlessly, robe flaring. Tiles crack under rapid steps.

7 (10–11.5s) BAMBOO FOREST AXE BURST
Whip transition lands him in forest. He grabs axe mid-motion and chops wood at insane speed—each swing splitting logs and launching chips like ricocheting projectiles.

8 (11.5–13s) SUNSET FATIGUE RUN
Lighting shifts to amber. Same continuous camera tracks him looping tasks—run, chop, stumble recover. Motion stays fast but posture collapses slightly each step.

9 (13–14.5s) RETURN PASS
He walks back through temple gate. Other monks salute. He tries to respond properly but only manages delayed, tired nods while still moving.

10 (14.5–15s) BED DROP END
Camera follows into dorm. He collapses instantly onto mat. Eyes close mid-fall. Final frame holds on stillness as wind chime rings once.

SFX: playful shakuhachi + brisk percussion engine, comedic taiko “bonk” hits on monk impacts, rope snap + water splash burst at well, fast wooden clack for training chaos, bamboo crack percussion in forest, ending with soft koto + single wind chime decay into silence.

#sd2 #seedance #aivideo #CatsLover

prompts.display_text: Cinematic hyper-dynamic fast-paced multi-shot sequence, epic mythological battlefield, IMAX film simulation, 35mm Panavision lens, f/4, heavy cinematic color grading, dramatic contrast between dark necrotic tones and radiant golden divine light. Shot 1: Extreme close-up on Sun Wukong’s face, covered in dirt and blood, golden eyes flickering with exhaustion yet defiance. His fur is matted, his breathing heavy. He kneels in the center of a ruined battlefield, his golden staff cracked and planted into the ground for support. Around him, countless skeletal warriors slowly close in, their hollow eyes glowing with eerie green fire. Shot 2: Rapid shaky handheld shot circling Wukong. The skeletal army tightens its formation, bones clattering, rusted weapons scraping. Wukong struggles to stand, gripping his staff, as the undead swarm prepares to strike from all directions. Shot 3: Low-angle shot from behind Wukong. Just as the skeletons lunge forward, a faint golden glow begins to emerge behind him, cutting through the darkness like dawn breaking through a storm. Shot 4: Sudden explosive bloom of radiant golden light. A towering Buddha manifestation appears behind Wukong, विशाल and serene, radiating infinite divine energy. The battlefield is instantly bathed in warm, overwhelming golden luminosity. Shot 5: Fast upward tilt. Rows upon rows of celestial soldiers materialize in the sky and on the ground behind the Buddha—heavenly generals clad in ornate golden armor, divine banners flowing, weapons shining with sacred light. Shot 6: Whip-pan across the battlefield. The skeletons freeze mid-attack, their bodies trembling under the pressure of the divine aura. Golden light surges outward like a tidal wave. Shot 7: Ultra-fast sequence of disintegration shots. The skeletal army is instantly reduced to ash—bones crack, dissolve, and scatter into glowing dust, evaporating into nothingness under the overwhelming holy radiance. Shot 8: Wide epic drone pull-back. Wukong stands silhouetted in front of the colossal golden Buddha and the vast heavenly army. The battlefield, once dark and corrupted, is now purified, glowing with divine light. Golden particles drift through the air like sacred snow. Final frame: Freeze in epic tension—Wukong gripping his staff, head slightly bowed, while behind him the Buddha and celestial army radiate infinite power, dominating the horizon.

prompts.display_text: The camera rockets up from beneath a burning battlefield trench, tearing past shattered stone pillars, broken siege engines, and falling embers, then whips into a downward tilt to reveal a vast war-torn valley below in full violent eruption—armies colliding, fire lines spreading, and massive explosions ripping through the ground. At the edge of a разрушed fortress cliff stands a warrior woman in dark, battle-scarred armor, utterly fearless, gazing into the chaos below as if commanding the war itself. The shot continues in one fluid move: the camera arcs past her shoulder, ash and sparks streaking across frame, then spirals downward around the cliff in a tightening circle, revealing scale—burning catapults, collapsing towers, soldiers scattering like ants, and distant shadowy war beasts moving through smoke and fire. The spiral tightens, speed increasing, wind roaring harder, battlefield sound swelling—metal clashes, distant screams, thunder rolling across a blood-red sky. Then the camera rises slightly into a final close, frontal reveal of her face—wind-whipped, streaked with ash and sweat, completely calm, eyes locked forward, burning with cold determination as firelight flickers across her expression.

prompts.display_text: A one-take begins in extreme close-up on a Stone Age hand gripping a rough flint tool. The camera rotates slowly around the hand as the tool transforms continuously and almost instantly through human history: flint knife to polished spearhead, bronze blade, iron hammer, chisel, quill, compass, telescope, mechanical wrench, fountain pen, soldering iron, keyboard, smartphone, then a gesture controlling floating AI interfaces in midair. The hand ages, changes, scars, skin tone, clothing, and era, but the grip and movement stay continuous. Around it, the blurred environment transforms too: cave wall paintings, mud-brick settlement, forge, library, ship deck, workshop, factory, laboratory, server room, and intelligent future workspace. Each transformation must feel like one invention leading naturally to the next. The story is humanity learning to shape the world with increasing precision. Final reveal: the hand opens, no longer gripping a tool but guiding a luminous AI-generated model of Earth, showing the shift from surviving nature to collaborating with intelligence itself.

prompts.display_text: The masked ronin dashes across the drifting platforms, pursued by a colossal winged beast whose chest is a swirling vortex of storm clouds and lightning. The camera hurtles from island to island, struggling to keep up as rocks tilt, spin, and crumble away beneath them. Every wingbeat sends shockwaves through the air, shaking the frame and blowing debris and rain straight into the viewer's face. Rapid handheld cuts capture the ronin leaping impossible gaps, sword carving arcs of light that briefly cut through the darkness. The finale shows the camera diving behind him as he jumps off the last crumbling rock, riding a bolt of lightning directly into the monster's chest vortex with a final, all-or-nothing slash that explodes the storm from within and clears the sky in a blinding flash.

prompts.display_text: **Environment:** A massive grassland under a violent thunderstorm. Rolling plains stretch toward distant mountains while lightning flashes illuminate the rain-soaked terrain. **Action:** 15.0s sequence from the POV of a lightning wolf racing through tall grass. Sparks of electricity crackle along the edges of the wolf’s vision as energy builds with every stride. At the 2-second mark the wolf accelerates into a full sprint. Rain streaks across the camera as the wolf leaps over fallen trees and rocky terrain. A rival wolf pack appears ahead. prompts.display_text: Style 100% real-life filmed texture, iPhone documentary look, handheld single take feeling, natural low-light environment, slight breathing shake, subtle focus hunting, soft sensor noise in shadows. Character Reference: 1 as the exact character reference. Face, body, posture, clothing must remain identical. No stylization drift. Environment A dark living room at night. Only light source: a TV screen flickering. Minimal furniture. Quiet atmosphere. Hook (0–3s) The TV glitches. For a split second, something is off. Then the room flickers into a completely different reality. 13-Second One-Take Sequence 0–2s The living room suddenly transforms into a horror scene, walls decayed, dim red lighting, distant whispering. The character doesn’t react. SFX: glitch + low horror ambience 2–3s Instant flicker → now sci-fi spaceship interior. Cold blue lights. Mechanical hum. 3–5s The Netflix red glow slowly spreads from the TV across the room. Light bleeds into every surface. Music: deep cinematic build begins 5–7s The world cycles rapidly around the character: • medieval throne room • crime interrogation room • post-apocalyptic wasteland All while the character stands perfectly still in center frame. 7–9s The character slowly raises a remote. Presses pause. SFX: hard digital click 9–11s Everything freezes mid-action: • a sword mid-swing • dust particles suspended • a character mid-fall Absolute silence. 11–12s The main character looks around calmly. Steps through the frozen scene. 12–13s They sit back into their original couch position. The room snaps back to normal. On TV: “Continue Watching?” Soft Netflix red glow fades. Audio Direction SFX: glitch distortions, environment swaps, digital pause click Music: slow cinematic build → cuts to silence at pause → subtle ambient ending Important Notes Keep transitions fast but readable All environments must feel real, not stylized CGI Character must remain calm → contrast is key

Seedance 2.0 Prompt: Style 100% real-life filmed texture, iPhone documentary look, handheld single take feeling, natural low-light environment, slight breathing shake, subtle focus hunting, soft sensor noise in shadows.
Character Reference: Use Image1 as the exact character reference. Face, body, posture, clothing must remain identical. No stylization drift.
Environment A dark living room at night. Only light source: a TV screen flickering. Minimal furniture. Quiet atmosphere.
Hook (0–3s) The TV glitches.
For a split second, something is off.
Then the room flickers into a completely different reality.
13-Second One-Take Sequence
0–2s The living room suddenly transforms into a horror scene, walls decayed, dim red lighting, distant whispering.
The character doesn’t react.
SFX: glitch + low horror ambience
2–3s Instant flicker → now sci-fi spaceship interior.
Cold blue lights. Mechanical hum.
3–5s The Netflix red glow slowly spreads from the TV across the room.
Light bleeds into every surface.
Music: deep cinematic build begins
5–7s The world cycles rapidly around the character:
• medieval throne room • crime interrogation room • post-apocalyptic wasteland
All while the character stands perfectly still in center frame.
7–9s The character slowly raises a remote.
Presses pause.
SFX: hard digital click
9–11s Everything freezes mid-action:
• a sword mid-swing • dust particles suspended • a character mid-fall
Absolute silence.
11–12s The main character looks around calmly.
Steps through the frozen scene.
12–13s They sit back into their original couch position.
The room snaps back to normal.
On TV: “Continue Watching?”
Soft Netflix red glow fades.
Audio Direction
SFX: glitch distortions, environment swaps, digital pause click
Music: slow cinematic build → cuts to silence at pause → subtle ambient ending
Important Notes
Keep transitions fast but readable
All environments must feel real, not stylized CGI
Character must remain calm → contrast is key

prompts.display_text: Cinematic dark fairy-tale thriller with comedic twist, eerie enchanted forest, low-key lighting, cold moonlight filtering through dense trees, volumetric fog, high contrast shadows, dynamic handheld camera, expressive character animation, fast-paced storytelling. S1 (0.9s) Wide shot: An orange cat older brother in blue overalls and a gray flat cap runs barefoot through a dark forest, pulling along a white cat little sister in a dirty pink dress, both breathing heavily. S2 (0.8s) Rear tracking shot: The forest behind them echoes with distant howling wolves, shadows shifting between trees. S3 (0.9s) Forward reveal: Through the fog, a glowing candy house made of sweets appears at the end of the path, colorful and surreal against the dark woods. S4 (0.7s) Close-up: The siblings slow down, eyes wide—fear mixed with curiosity. S5 (0.8s) Door action: The orange cat cautiously pushes open the candy door, it creaks softly. S6 (0.9s) Interior wide: Inside, dim warm light reveals a strange room—giant half-open birdcage, scattered sweets, and a bed in the corner. S7 (0.8s) Close-up: On the bed lies a white-haired “grandma” in green pajamas and a white shower cap, blanket half covering her face. S8 (0.9s) Dialogue moment: The “grandma” weakly gestures toward the birdcage, implying there is cake nearby, voice soft and inviting. S9 (0.8s) Insert shot: A cake sits temptingly near the open birdcage door. S10 (1.0s) Action split: The little sister eagerly reaches for the cake, while the orange cat narrows his eyes, scanning the room. S11 (0.9s) Suspicion reveal: Close-up at the foot of the bed—a wolf tail sticks out from beneath the blanket. S12 (1.0s) Action burst: The orange cat instantly grabs a nearby large iron shovel, swings it with full force toward the “grandma’s” head. S13 (1.0s) Impact & reveal: The shower cap flies off—“grandma” leaps up in pain, revealing a ferocious wolf face, snarling before panicking. S14 (1.0s) Escape: The wolf stumbles and scrambles out the door, fleeing into the dark forest. S15 (1.2s) Final comedic beat: The orange cat scratches the back of his head proudly, while the little sister happily eats cake beside him, cheering with crumbs on her face. Motion & Effects: Dynamic chase camera, shaky handheld for tension, fast snap zooms during action, exaggerated character expressions, cloth and fur simulation, soft glow from candy elements, contrast between horror atmosphere and playful comedic timing.

prompts.display_text: A high-stakes, 15-second cinematic sequence of a sorceress in a pale yellow silk gown performing a primal fire ritual on a cracked volcanic plain. The ritual culminates in the manifestation of a colossal fire lion that transcends the physical realm, turning the sky into an apocalyptic firestorm.Action Breakdown (0–15s)0–3s (The Manifestation): The shot opens with the woman slamming her hands toward the earth. The volcanic rock explodes as a 20-foot-tall lion made of roiling solar fire lunges from the fissures. Her gown whips violently in the resulting thermal blast.3–7s (The Synchronization): A rapid, low-angle orbital camera move circles the duo. The woman weaves her arms in a commanding dance; the lion mimics her movements, swiping a massive flaming paw at the camera and leaving a trail of intense heat haze and sparks across the lens.7–10s (The Compression): The woman pulls her hands together at her chest, drawing the lion’s mass inward. The beast recoils and condenses into a blinding, white-hot orb of pure energy between her palms. A dramatic snap-zoom focuses on her face, her eyes reflecting the swirling solar core.11–13s (The Shockwave): The orb detonates. A massive, golden circular shockwave ripples outward, disintegrating nearby rock pillars into dust. The lion re-emerges behind her, now three times its previous size—a gargantuan, translucent celestial titan that rears back and roars into the heavens.13–15s (The Firestorm): The celestial lion dissolves into a million falling stars. The camera pulls back into an epic wide shot, showing the woman’s tiny silhouette standing in a rain of golden embers as the storm clouds above ignite into a gargantuan, swirling fire-vortex.Technical & Atmospheric DetailsCharacter: The sorceress appears triumphant and powerful, her silhouette sharp against the blinding light. Her gown glows brilliantly, appearing almost translucent in the final explosion.The Elemental: Transitions from "liquid lava" textures (0-7s) to a "blinding star" (7-10s) and finally to a "nebula-like constellation" (11-15s).Lighting: High-contrast, cinematic lighting. The scene shifts from deep orange and black to a blinding white-out, ending in a warm, golden atmospheric glow.Sound Design: Begins with the "crunch" of earth and "roar" of fire, followed by a high-pitched ringing during the compression, and ending with a low-frequency "thoom" of the shockwave and the shimmering sound of falling embers. on @haimeta_ai

prompts.display_text: Cinematic shot, HYPER-REALISTIC 8K rendering. The scene is governed by a single, unwavering rule: the SUN and SKY are photorealistic and real; EVERY OTHER ELEMENT, without exception, is a completely and consistently rendered, FULLY VOLUMETRIC, three-dimensional stained-glass art installation. The soundtrack contains NO MUSIC, only the rich, resonant, and diegetic sound effects of the environment and the characters' actions. The setting is a city street at dusk. The real sun has just set, but the sky is still filled with a deep orange and purple light. The street is made of volumetric glass cobblestones, and is flanked by towering, sculptural 3D stained-glass buildings. A Day Chaser, a bike messenger, is weaving through traffic at high speed. They are a living being, their body showing the focused, athletic posture of an experienced urban cyclist. They lean hard into a turn, their glass eyes scanning ahead for obstacles. Their bike is a functional, 3D sculpture of leaded glass and brass-toned glass fittings. As they ride, they are actively chasing the last usable light of the day, moving from the deep shadows of the buildings into the open intersections where the bright light of the real sky is still reflected on the wet glass streets. When they pass through these patches of reflected light, their body projects a fleeting, beautiful, and kinetic smear of caustics onto the 3D glass pavement. Key Visual Directives for Realism: Day Chaser Materiality (THE CORRECT LOOK): A masterpiece of stained-glass art, composed of multiple, individually crafted, stained-glass pieces, meticulously leaded together. They possess believable human features (hair, eyes, mouth) in intricate glasswork, with a sophisticated palette. Consistent 3D World: The buildings, the street, the bike, and other sculptural glass vehicles are all rendered as fully volumetric, 3D objects. Light Dynamics: The light is ambient and reflected from the sky, creating a moody, high-contrast urban scene. No mystical glowing or artificial CGI sparkles. Implied Sound (Diegetic Only): The whirring sound of the glass bike's chain and gears. The hiss of the glass tires on the wet glass cobblestones. The distant, echoing, resonant sounds of a stained-glass city at nightfall. Artistic Tone: Gritty, energetic, and cool. A scene about a living being's focused and skillful work, rigorously adhering to the core visual laws.

prompts.display_text: High-quality anime style, 2D animation. Warm, cinematic lighting with sunlight filtering through blinds. A tiny man wearing a green hoodie and blue jeans runs across a wooden floor toward a giantess. He climbs up her massive foot and leg, which are covered in black fishnet stockings, using the fishnet holes to climb. Dynamic low-angle camera following his ascent, emphasizing the colossal scale of the giantess. He climbs past her black pleated skirt and white collared shirt, scaling up her dark blue ribbed sweater. The camera pans up to reveal the giantess looking down at him. She has long brown hair, a flower hair clip, and large brown eyes. She wears a highly surprised, wide-eyed expression with a slight blush. Background is a softly blurred bedroom with a music keyboard.

prompts.display_text: POV downhill longboard run, viral energy, max chaos. SUBJECTS: First-person downhill longboard rider, front foot, deck nose, and flickering trucks appearing low in frame during drops, slides, and stair gaps. Flower pots, café chairs, scooters, cats, delivery bikes, tourists, and laundry erupt around the rider as sudden obstacles. ENVIRONMENT: Dense Mediterranean cliffside town, whitewashed stair alleys, blue shutters, tiled landings, sea-glow at the horizon, hanging laundry, tangled wires, sun-faded murals, narrow terraces, umbrellas, puddles, warm late afternoon light, deep stone shadows, layered rooftops dropping toward the coast below. MOOD: Adrenaline, max chaos, nonstop downhill street speed. COLOR LOGIC: Hyperreal Pop Look with sun-bleached whites, cobalt accents, coral signage, golden flare. CAMERA DETAILS: 360 action-cam POV, horizon-stable but brutal, nonstop forward drive, minimal roll, heavy stair vibration, sharp side and rear parallax, full-sphere chaos, no release. 0:00–0:03: POV freefalls into a steep stone stairwell, board nose rattling low in frame as the rider lands into brutal vibrating descent. A café server yanks a tray away from the line while walls, balconies, plants, and faces whip past inches away. SFX: sea wind, wheel chatter, stair hits, breath, distant crowd. 0:03–0:05: POV slashes left across a tiny tiled landing, clips past stacked flower pots, then snaps into another stair drop as hanging laundry lashes across the front hemisphere and tourists recoil. SFX: cloth slap, ceramic clink, wheel scrape, crowd gasp. 0:05–0:08: POV hammers the next staircase as a cat darts center frame and pigeons burst upward from a side ledge. The rider speed-check slides, then threads between a parked scooter and iron handrail with almost no clearance. SFX: tire chirp, wings flapping, metal rattle, stair thuds. 0:08–0:10: POV blasts over a short cobblestone gap between stair sections, trucks clacking, then drops straight into the next descending run as delivery bikes streak through the side wrap. SFX: wheel buzz, curb thump, distant horn, crowd echo. 0:10–0:13: POV attacks two tight landings and another steep stepped lane, every hit jolting the sphere as rooftops, awnings, church bells, alley mouths, and flashes of sea curl around the viewer. SFX: air rush, heavy thump, stair chatter, wind buffeting. 0:13–0:15: POV rips to a cliff overlook and throws into a savage stand-up slide, dust and tiny pebbles spraying across the lower frame while the glowing sea-town skyline blooms around the full sphere. SFX: wheel screech, gravel spray, crowd roar. Hyperreal, continuous-shot chaos, no text, no logos.

prompts.display_text: Cinematic fantasy dark-comedy action, medieval European castle bedroom, warm candlelight vs cold moonlight contrast, dramatic shadows, ultra-dynamic camera, exaggerated character animation, high-detail textures, fast-paced editing, humorous tone. S1 (0.9s) Wide shot: A chubby orange cat in full medieval European knight armor stands beside a luxurious canopy bed inside a castle bedroom, moonlight spilling through wooden windows. S2 (0.8s) Close-up: On the bed, a white cat princess sleeps messily, loudly snoring, one paw casually picking her nose in an unrefined, comedic manner. S3 (0.9s) Medium shot: The orange cat shakes her urgently, armor clanking, trying to wake her up, visibly frustrated. S4 (0.7s) Close-up: The princess continues snoring, completely unfazed, bubble forming from her nose. S5 (0.8s) Cut to window: Outside the wooden window, a pair of giant glowing eyes suddenly appears in the darkness. S6 (0.9s) Reveal shot: A pink fire-breathing dragon presses its face near the window, exhaling faint smoke, eyes wide and menacing. S7 (0.8s) Reaction shot: The orange cat freezes, then instantly turns serious, gripping his longsword. S8 (1.0s) Action burst: With a powerful kick, the orange cat smashes through the wooden window, splinters flying outward. S9 (1.0s) Balcony wide shot: The cat lands on the stone balcony, facing the hovering pink dragon under moonlight. S10 (1.0s) Combat: The cat lunges forward, slashing rapidly with the longsword, sparks and motion blur streaks. S11 (0.8s) Twist: The dragon suddenly opens its mouth and bites down, swallowing the sword whole. S12 (0.9s) Close-up: The orange cat pauses, then instantly switches expression, huge sparkling eyes, puffed cheeks, exaggerated ultra-cute innocent face. S13 (1.0s) Reaction: The dragon’s fierce expression melts into confusion and softness, flames dying down. S14 (1.0s) Punchline action: In a split-second, the orange cat snaps back to normal and kicks the dragon hard, sending it tumbling off the balcony into a deep abyss. S15 (1.2s) Final close-up: The orange cat turns to camera, smirks proudly, and gives a playful left-eye wink, armor gleaming in moonlight. Motion & Effects: Fast-paced comedic timing, strong motion blur, dynamic camera swings (orbit, low-angle, snap zooms), particle effects (wood splinters, smoke, sparks), expressive character animation, seamless flow, high-impact yet humorous finish.

prompts.display_text: Alien ships drop into frame from above, flying low between skyscrapers and staying directly ahead. Their cannons charge and fire, explosions erupt in sequence along the road. The camera tilts sharply upward mid-flight, bringing the ships into full view overhead. It then banks hard into a side angle, racing alongside them as they blast the street below. The camera whips into a backward tracking motion, ships pushing forward toward the lens, firing relentlessly, shockwaves chasing the camera. A final snap into a tight follow shot behind a ship locks the motion as it continues firing into the city. Continuous motion, no cuts, ships always visible, high tension.

prompts.display_text: Static close-up shot. A realistic human hand interacts with a flat 2D animated character of Furina — a blue and white dress anime girl with long light blue hair — inside a clear glass cup placed on a wooden table. [0-2s] The hand pinches Furina by the head and lowers her into the glass; she grabs the rim with both arms and resists, refusing to go in, while the fingers keep pressing her down. [2-4s] She loses grip and slides down the glass wall, desperately kicking and clawing at the wall trying to climb back up, but keeps slipping back to the bottom, with a surprised yelp. [4-7s] She gives up and slumps at the bottom, eyes shut, two exaggerated wide noodle-tears streaming down her cheeks, crying dramatically. [7-9s] She suddenly leaps up, shaking both fists at her sides furiously, tears still on her face, yelling angrily upward in protest — expression both crying and fuming, super cute. [9-11s] The finger reaches in and gently pats her head; she immediately stops, sits still obediently, hands clasped on her chest, looking up at the finger with big teary puppy eyes. [11-13s] The fingers pinch her head again and lift her straight up out of the glass; halfway up she tilts her head slightly, eyes half-lidded, a small smug tsundere smile on her lips. [13-15s] Fully lifted out and suspended in the air, her eyes open wide and she breaks into a big bright energetic grin, hands spread open happily, frame holds steady. AR mixed-media style: flat 2D cartoon character with full physical interaction with a real 3D glass — sliding and climbing along the glass wall, realistic glass refractions, cast shadows, and wall contact all rendered naturally. Soft warm natural lighting, super cute and heartwarming mood.

prompts.display_text: A small white mushroom-eared creature is hurled forward from outstretched hands. It tumbles toward the camera, its white body swelling until it fills the entire frame — white flash. Chase camera locks behind the mushroom-eared creature as it rockets forward and slams into a wall of red crystalline armor. On impact it explodes — cyan crystal shards and square pixel-particles burst radially. The creature splits into several identical copies that scatter in every direction. The camera pulls straight up, revealing a circular red arena from overhead. The copies ricochet off surfaces in erratic bouncing arcs, each landing triggering a magenta or blue starburst flash. A white variant joins mid-sequence, trailing blue beam lines. The bouncing grows chaotic with overlapping hit effects. One mushroom-eared creature arcs directly past the lens, its body blocking the frame — wipe to black. A character stands behind a large golden wheel covered in ornate engravings. Both hands grip the wheel's rim and push — the wheel spins. The character grins while watching it turn. The camera starts tight on the character's hands and the spinning wheel, then slowly widens. Red carnival lamps ring the stage. Gold sparkles drift upward. Small white and black mushroom-eared creatures sit in the foreground as an audience, arms raised. The spinning golden wheel glows brighter frame by frame, bleaching to searing white. All figures become silhouettes against the expanding light. The camera pushes IN toward the light source — total whiteout. White flash erupts. A warm-colored blast wave expands outward from center screen. Smaller mushroom-eared creatures launch outward from the center in every direction. The character strikes a double peace sign as multicolored confetti rains from above.

A small white mushroom-eared creature is hurled forward from outstretched hands. It tumbles toward the camera, its white body swelling until it fills the entire frame — white flash.

Chase camera locks behind the mushroom-eared creature as it rockets forward and slams into a wall of red crystalline armor. On impact it explodes — cyan crystal shards and square pixel-particles burst radially. The creature splits into several identical copies that scatter in every direction.

The camera pulls straight up, revealing a circular red arena from overhead. The copies ricochet off surfaces in erratic bouncing arcs, each landing triggering a magenta or blue starburst flash. A white variant joins mid-sequence, trailing blue beam lines. The bouncing grows chaotic with overlapping hit effects.

One mushroom-eared creature arcs directly past the lens, its body blocking the frame — wipe to black.

A character stands behind a large golden wheel covered in ornate engravings. Both hands grip the wheel's rim and push — the wheel spins. The character grins while watching it turn. The camera starts tight on the character's hands and the spinning wheel, then slowly widens. Red carnival lamps ring the stage. Gold sparkles drift upward. Small white and black mushroom-eared creatures sit in the foreground as an audience, arms raised.

The spinning golden wheel glows brighter frame by frame, bleaching to searing white. All figures become silhouettes against the expanding light. The camera pushes IN toward the light source — total whiteout.

White flash erupts. A warm-colored blast wave expands outward from center screen. Smaller mushroom-eared creatures launch outward from the center in every direction. The character strikes a double peace sign as multicolored confetti rains from above.

prompts.display_text: Style: Mockumentary (Vlog Style), hyper-realism, fixed camera real-shot feel, natural light, suspense comedy vibe, mobile phone vertical screen shooting texture Duration: 15 seconds Scene: Ordinary family living room, in front of white walls, afternoon sidelight streaming in from the window, yoga mat on the floor, clear human shadows projected on the wall Characters: Female lead @image1 , wearing a sports tank top and yoga pants, ponytail, recording a dance video against a phone tripod [00:00-00:05] Shot 1: Everyday Setup (Normalcy / Fixed Camera) Frame: Fixed camera medium shot, phone selfie perspective. Action: Female lead makes a heart gesture to the camera, then starts dancing a simple popular TikTok routine, movements a bit clumsy, occasionally glancing at the phone on the floor for cues. Key Details: At this point, the shadow on the wall is completely normal, perfectly in sync with her movements. Background is quiet, only the music from the Bluetooth speaker playing. Atmosphere: Utterly everyday, no hints of anything unusual. [00:05-00:11] Shot 2: BUG Emerges (The Glitch / Same Fixed Camera) Action: Female lead repeats the same dance segment, and midway through a turn— High-Energy Moment (Core Punch): The shadow on the wall suddenly **doesn't follow the turn**, instead switching on its own to a completely different set of high-difficulty street dance moves (Breaking Power Move), the shadow executing a flawless Thomas full spin on the wall, smooth and fluid. Female lead hasn't noticed yet, keeps dancing her simple steps, but the shadow has fully broken sync, going wild with a solo on the wall. Director's Note: The shadow's dance skills should clearly outclass the body. The bigger the contrast in their moves, the stronger the comedy—body doing the "I Love You" hand gesture dance, shadow pulling off windmill floor moves. [00:11-00:15] Shot 3: Comedy Reversal (The Punchline / Same Fixed Camera) Action: Female lead finishes dancing and looks back at the phone replay, spots the shadow's anomaly, whips her head around to glare at the wall. Result: The shadow has now reverted to normal—obediently mirroring every one of her movements. Female lead suspiciously raises her right hand slowly, shadow raises its right hand too. She quickly switches to left hand—shadow follows without a hitch. Final Freeze: Female lead with a "Am I losing my mind?" expression straight to the camera, but in the last 0.5 seconds before the frame ends, the shadow sneaks in a peace sign gesture the instant she looks at the lens. Frame freezes on this beat.

prompts.display_text: cinematic quality, with a cool color palette of cold whites, pale blues, and subtle neon reflections. Floating debris suspended in the air, dynamic motion, dramatic lighting, high-end anime film look. Character: A petite anime girl with long silver-white hair styled in twin low sections, soft layered strands flowing weightlessly, with subtle iridescent color streaks (cyan, magenta, yellow accents). Large teal-green eyes, calm and emotionless with a faint hint of softness. Wearing a black futuristic tactical jacket covered in multicolor glitch-like paint patterns (RGB splashes), high collar partially covering her mouth, multiple belts, pouches, and mechanical details. Equipped with sleek high-tech headphones with glowing accents. Slim build, delicate but precise movements. Weapon: A minimalist black katana with subtle reflective edge, clean and elegant design. Scene: Interior of a white, ethereal zero-gravity space. The environment is minimalistic and surreal, with soft glowing light, broken gravity, floating fragments of panels and geometric debris drifting slowly. The space feels silent, vast, and dreamlike. 0–3s — tension Camera drifts slowly in zero gravity. The girl floats in mid-air, hair and jacket drifting softly. She holds the katana loosely, body relaxed but ready. Tiny debris particles pass by in slow motion. 3–6s — ignition Enemy figures (abstract humanoid silhouettes, minimal detail) push off floating surfaces and rush toward her from multiple directions. She slightly tilts her head, eyes tracking movement precisely. 6–10s — chaos choreography Combat begins in full 360° zero-gravity space. She spins gracefully mid-air, body rotating fluidly while executing precise katana strikes. Each slash is clean and controlled, leaving faint neon trails (cool blue/purple). Camera follows her in a smooth tumbling motion, synchronized with her rotation, maintaining cinematic clarity. 10–13s — escalation She lightly touches a floating fragment with her foot, then forcefully launches herself forward. High-speed dash across multiple enemies in a straight, elegant line. Time slightly compresses, emphasizing speed and precision. 13–15s — final frame Motion slows down. Enemy bodies drift apart silently in zero gravity. She stabilizes her posture, floating upright. Hair and jacket settle gently. She lowers the katana slightly. Final frame holds on her calm expression in the white void. Freeze.

prompts.display_text: *“Anime cooking scene, Makoto Shinkai cinematic style, side-angle camera. Flour-dusted wooden table, sunlight streaming through window, all ingredients arranged in bowls: tomato sauce, cherry tomatoes, salami, mushrooms, peppers, shredded mozzarella, parmesan, fresh basil, olive oil bottle, dried oregano, red pepper flakes. Hands pick up dough ball, begin stretching it sideways — dough pulls and stretches thin, flour dust lifts into sunlight in slow motion. Hands place stretched dough flat on floured surface, grab wooden rolling pin — roll firmly forward and back, dough spreads wide, edges curl slightly. Hands lift dough round, lay it flat. Spoon scoops tomato sauce from red bowl, pours onto center of dough — back of spoon spreads it in slow confident spiral outward, sauce glistens. Hands drizzle olive oil bottle in thin stream over sauce — golden drops catch sunlight. Right hand grabs shredded mozzarella by the handful, scatters generously — cheese lands softly across surface. Hands layer toppings one by one: salami slices placed in overlapping circle, mushroom slices dropped casually, colorful pepper pieces scattered, cherry tomatoes halved and pressed gently into cheese. Fingers pinch dried oregano from jar, crumble over pizza — fine herb dust floats in light rays. Pinch of red pepper flakes scattered. Fresh basil leaves torn by hand, placed last. Hands slide pizza onto wooden peel. Camera pulls back — full pizza visible, golden afternoon light, flour particles glowing, volumetric light rays through window. Rich layered sounds throughout: dough stretching, rolling pin on wood, sauce spreading, cheese scattering, toppings dropping. 15 seconds, smooth flowing pacing, ultra-detailed food animation.”* Step 5: Click Generate and wait for the result

prompts.display_text: The camera rockets up from below, tearing past jagged cliff walls, then whips into a downward tilt to reveal the ocean below in full violent eruption, waves detonating against black rock. On the cliff edge stands a warrior woman, utterly fearless, gazing into the maelstrom as if daring it to rise higher. She steps forward without hesitation and leaps off the edge, arms spread wide, plummeting through howling wind and salt spray. The camera dives alongside her in freefall, her hair and cloak thrashing upward as the black rocks and churning sea rush closer. Then a massive shadow tears through the mist below — a dragon surges upward with wings unfurling like storm sails, scales gleaming wet with ocean spray. It swoops beneath her mid-fall, and she lands on its back with practiced grace, fingers gripping the ridges along its neck. The dragon banks hard, climbing in a spiraling arc back up past the cliff face. The camera keeps pace, circling tight, then pulls ahead into a final close, frontal reveal: she rides the beast skyward, wind-whipped, calm, and burning with determination, the raging ocean now small and powerless far below.

Emphasize grandeur and regal atmosphere, photorealistic or stylized cinematic look, precise positioning, collision-free animation."

prompts.text: How to nail that slow-motion effect? You’ve probably seen a ton of these videos lately. They all share one common problem: everyone is just ripping each other off, resulting in the same repetitive content. Some people simply don't know any better, some copy-paste directly, and others tweak the prompt just a tiny bit. Well... since we consider ourselves masters of "creative borrowing," let’s follow the golden rule: steal like a butterfly, execute like a bee! Or however that saying goes... Anyway, here are a few prompts and a step-by-step guide to get you started. Step 1. Come up with a character and a location. For our example, we chose a coworking space and went with a "fake guru" theme. Step 2. Create a reference photo of your character in that location. This image will define the visual style of your future video. For the photo, use Nano Banana Pro and, for instance, our Prompt Base ( https:// cherner.notion.site/np-prompt-base ?source=copy_link ...) from the club. Step 3. Crafting the video prompt. We’ve provided two different versions of prompts via this link ( https:// cherner.notion.site/seedance2-prom pt ...) that we developed and tested ourselves. One is detailed, the other is more concise. Both work great. Your task is to take either prompt, drop it into your prompt engineer tool or even just a standard LLM, and request the following: Based on my context, character description, commands, and plot, create an optimized version of this prompt. Context: For the foundation of the prompt and the special effects occurring within it. [Paste one of our prompts here] Character & Style: [Paste a detailed character description, cinematography parameters, and style here]. Commands: Duration: 15 seconds. Scene Count: One continuous tracking shot rotating around the character. Vary the framing, perspective, and angles, but do not use any jump cuts or editing transitions. Write this prompt in Chinese. However, keep all spoken dialogue in English. Force-translate all system keys, section titles, and structural elements into Chinese, ignoring standard English syntax—everything except the characters' lines must be in Chinese. Plot: Overlap with the context [details of your plot, descriptions of surrounding characters, and events]. You will receive a single refined prompt as the output. Step 4. Editing. Try running 3–4 generations from a single prompt. Then, cut everything into individual shots and select the best ones. AI generation is complex, and you might not get the perfect result on the first try. This approach makes it easier to build a visually stunning story. However, a problem arises: how do you fill the gaps? That’s where Step 5 comes in. Step 5. This is the step that will make your generation more engaging and help it stand out from the crowd. As it turns out, you don't have to just settle for a few generations based on one prompt like all the corner-cutters do. You can create a full narrative. Nothing is stopping you from generating several close-ups of other characters (a bulldog, a fish in an aquarium, someone comically eating pizza in slow-mo, etc.) and then weaving these shots between your best footage from Step 4. This is how you achieve a professional-grade video with a real plot. Give it a try! Have a great week, everyone. P.S. The prompts for the bulldog and the grandma are also available via the link.

prompts.display_text: A cinematic one-shot begins inside a silent grand museum at night. The camera moves toward a massive painting of a storm at sea. As it nears the canvas, the painted waves begin moving, and the frame transforms continuously without cuts: the painted ocean becomes real water flooding the gallery floor, the gallery becomes a ship deck in a hurricane, the sailcloth becomes desert tents, the tents become war banners on a battlefield, the banners become laundry lines in a sunlit village, the village walls become canyon cliffs, the cliffs become bookshelves in an endless library. Every transition must come from shared shapes and motion. A museum guard walks through all of it in disbelief, but the camera never leaves him. Frames become windows, windows become doorways, doorways become portals into new realities. Final transformation: the guard realizes he is now inside a painting, frozen in brushstroke texture, while museum visitors admire him from outside.

prompts.display_text: first-person POV, no cuts, no angle changes, no scene transitions, no montage, no flash cuts, no music, no subtitles. Only two characters: my unseen first-person POV and @ Image1 sitting across from me. Natural ambient sound only: light restaurant noise, tableware, distant water, faint voices, chewing, spitting, rinsing, my laughter. Setting: Outdoor dining table beside West Lake, Hangzhou, near the water, calm daylight or soft late afternoon light. Real smartphone-video realism, grounded textures, realistic food, realistic body and hand motion, accurate chopstick use, accurate mouth movement, accurate eye focus. The lake stays visible to one side of frame. Character: @ Image1 is the only visible person. She can switch seamlessly between slightly fierce-cute and soft adorable. Lip sync, voice, expressions, and body language stay fully synchronized. Emotional arc: cheerful and relaxed while eating, then shocked disgust, then angry embarrassment. Table: Exactly 7 dishes on the table. One dish is the West Lake vinegar fish shown in @ Image2. @ Image1 is happily eating rice and the other dishes, but not the fish at first. The table feels full but readable. The fish dish remains clearly visible before I offer it to her. Camera: Entire video is from my seated first-person view across the table. My hand and chopsticks may enter frame naturally. Slight handheld micro-shake from breathing and laughter only, never chaotic. No third-person shots, no reverse shots, no overhead shots, no cutaways. Continuous believable framing centered on @ Image1 with part of the lake visible. Action: @ Image1 sits opposite me, happily eating from her bowl, enjoying rice and other dishes except the West Lake vinegar fish. She looks bright, playful, relaxed, cute. From first-person POV, I pick up one bite of the fish with chopsticks and slowly extend it toward her. She notices it immediately, trusts me, leans forward, opens her mouth happily, and makes a cute “aam” sound as she bites the fish. I gently pull the chopsticks and my hand back out of frame. She chews happily for about one second, expecting it to taste good. Then the taste hits. Her expression changes instantly into exaggerated but believable disgust. Her face shifts into a comedic purple-disgust reaction while staying within realistic live-action style. She quickly turns toward the lake and spits it out with repeated “ptui, ptui, ptui” sounds. The motion is fast, fluid, and continuous from chewing to rejection. The moment she starts spitting, I begin laughing in first-person POV and keep laughing through the whole reaction. My laughter sounds genuine, amused, and uncontrollable, coming from behind the camera. The camera shakes slightly from laughing. After spitting, @ Image1 sticks out her tongue in disgust, immediately grabs the water on the table, and rinses her mouth quickly. prompts.display_text: Create a 4-second ultra-cute vertical animated character video. A tiny fluffy purple puppy-like creature with soft fur, a round face, big glossy expressive eyes, a small black nose, short floppy ears, and adorable baby proportions. The style is polished soft 3D animation, very cute, smooth fur, pastel purple background, soft studio lighting. The character walks forward slowly with natural body bounce and soft paw movement, first looking slightly away with an innocent expression. Then it turns its head and upper body toward the camera, gives a surprised but cheeky look, and raises one hand to show one middle finger clearly. It then turns forward again for a brief beat as if continuing to walk, then quickly looks back at the camera with a more mischievous expression and raises both hands, showing two middle fingers clearly at the same time. End on the double gesture for a brief moment so it is readable. Focus on smooth body plasticity, head turn, shoulder turn, eye movement, hand gesture clarity, and cute facial expression. The eyes must be large, shiny, and very expressive. The fur must look soft and detailed. The motion must be funny, cute, and playful, not aggressive. No text on screen. No captions. No overlays. Visual style: ultra-cute polished 3D character animation, soft pastel lighting, clean background, meme-ready, adorable but sassy. No realism, no horror, no ugly face, no distorted eyes, no extra fingers, no extra limbs, no blurry motion, no low-detail fur, no dark background, no aggressive tone, no human body proportions.
